intel_overview.headline_zh: 欧专局 AI 提速与 UPC 管辖收紧重塑欧洲 IP 格局
intel_overview.headline_en: EPO AI Acceleration and UPC Jurisdiction Shift Reshape Europe IP
intel_overview.summary_zh: 本期欧洲 IP 态势呈现“技术加速”与“司法收敛”双重特征。EPO 全面部署 AI 检索与笔录工具，显著提升审查效率并推动单一专利制度落地；UPC 上诉法院通过判例限制长臂管辖，为跨境诉讼确立新门槛。与此同时，欧盟强化打击假药及有组织犯罪，英国则迎来官费上调窗口。整体环境对高质量专利申请更友好，但诉讼策略需更精准应对管辖权挑战。
top_signals: EPO 全面启用 ANSERA 智能检索及 AI 辅助笔录，审查进入智能化快车道
UPC 上诉法院推翻针对非欧盟实体的长臂管辖，确立紧密连接点原则
欧盟法院裁定脱欧后纯英国权利不得支持欧盟商标异议，确权边界清晰化
UKIPO 确认 2026 年 4 月 1 日起全面上调专利、商标及外观设计官费
cross_currents: 欧洲正构建‘高效率授权 + 高标准维权’闭环：EPO 利用 AI 缩短周期，而 UPC 与欧盟执法机构同步收紧侵权认定与管辖范围
数据主权与合规成为隐性壁垒：EPO 坚持本土 AI 研发，配合欧盟反垄断调查中的广泛取证权，要求企业具备极高的数据治理水平
中小企业成为政策焦点：从 EUIPO 公益法律支持到地理标志新体系，欧盟试图通过降低门槛激活微观创新主体
implications: 中国出海企业需重构 FTO 分析流程，适应 EPO 语义检索升级，同时利用 UPC 管辖新规抗辩无实体运营的跨境诉讼
务必在 2026 年 4 月前完成英国 IP 申请提交以锁定旧费率，并重新评估纯英国权利在欧盟异议程序中的无效风险
涉数据密集型企业应建立动态合规监测机制，确保能从容应对欧盟委员会的反垄断信息调取及制裁股权穿透审查
watchlist: EPO 扩大上诉委员会关于‘说明书是否必须适应权利要求’的最终裁决
威尼斯法官临时会议是否召开及其对 UPC 裁判标准隐性调整的风向
德国宪法法院对 HMD 诉 VoiceAge 案中 FRAND 义务及移审问题的最终态度

daily_report.headline_zh: UPC 长臂管辖收紧，法官会议呼声响
daily_report.headline_en: UPC Curbs Long-Arm Jurisdiction; Judges Call for Meeting
daily_report.summary_zh: 本窗口期核心动态为 UPC 上诉法院连续裁决限制长臂管辖权，明确非欧盟实体在无紧密境内连接点时免受泛欧禁令，显著降低中企跨境诉讼风险。与此同时，业界呼吁召开临时威尼斯法官会议以统一裁判标准，EPO 亦调整 PACE 加速程序。德国量子专利激增与法国费率更新提示布局新动向。
key_moves: UPC 上诉法院推翻针对 OpenAI 等案的长臂管辖，限定领土范围
业界紧急呼吁召开临时威尼斯法官会议以解决司法分歧
EPO 修订 PACE 计划，2026 年 2 月起不再支持加速检索
德国量子技术专利申请十年增长近七倍，创新势头强劲
business_actions: 利用 UPC 最新判例抗辩，若无欧洲实体运营可主张无管辖权
重新规划欧专申请时间表，聚焦实审阶段而非检索加速
针对量子等热点领域提前进行 FTO 分析与核心专利布局
watchlist: UPC 首次向欧盟法院提请关于长臂管辖界限的先决裁决
扩大上诉委员会关于说明书是否必须适应权利要求的裁决
德国宪法法院对 HMD 违宪申诉的受理情况及后续走向

report_items.title_zh: 呼吁亟需召开威尼斯法官临时会议
report_items.title: “An interim Venice judges’ conference is desperately needed”
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出每年十月举行的威尼斯欧洲法官论坛是专利法官闭门交流思想的重要平台，律师通常被排除在外。鉴于当前欧洲专利诉讼环境变化，评论强调亟需召开一次临时会议，以确保法官间能继续就关键程序与裁判标准进行非公开的深度沟通，维护司法一致性。
core_points_zh: 威尼斯会议是欧洲专利法官闭门交流的核心年度机制
文章呼吁打破常规，亟需增加一次临时法官会议
旨在通过非公开对话解决当前专利诉讼中的分歧
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业应关注欧洲专利法官内部协调动态，这可能预示 UPC 裁判标准的微调。建议密切跟踪会议后续成果，评估对在建案件的影响，并提前调整诉讼策略以应对潜在的司法倾向变化。
insight_points_zh: 法官闭门会议可能引发 UPC 裁判标准的隐性调整
在欧中企需动态监控司法风向并优化诉讼布局

report_items.title_zh: InterDigital 诉亚马逊：全球专利升级时间线
report_items.title: InterDigital vs Amazon – A chronology of the escalation
report_items.summary_zh: InterDigital 在德国、美国、巴西及统一专利法院（UPC）起诉亚马逊，指控其 FireTV 和 Kindle 等设备及服务侵犯十项涉及视频压缩与 HDR 技术的专利。本案凸显跨国专利巨头利用欧洲新司法架构进行全球维权策略的升级，是观察 UPC 实务的重要案例。
core_points_zh: InterDigital 在四国及 UPC 发起针对亚马逊的专利侵权诉讼
涉案专利聚焦视频内容压缩及高动态范围图像质量改进技术
诉讼涵盖硬件设备与相关服务，体现全链条维权策略
report_items.insight_zh: 中国出海企业需警惕 NPE 利用 UPC 机制发起泛欧禁令风险。建议提前开展视频编码等领域 FTO 分析，评估专利稳定性，并制定包含无效宣告与和解谈判的综合应对预案，避免市场准入受阻。
insight_points_zh: 警惕 NPE 利用 UPC 单一判决覆盖多国市场的禁令风险
涉视频技术出口企业应强化 FTO 分析与无效证据储备

report_items.title_zh: HMD 就 VoiceAge 案向德国宪法法院提起违宪申诉
report_items.title: VoiceAge vs HMD saga continues with constitutional complaint
report_items.summary_zh: 芬兰 HMD Global 因与 VoiceAgeEVS 的标准必要专利纠纷，向德国联邦宪法法院提起申诉。HMD 指控德国联邦最高法院拒绝将 FRAND 许可义务的关键欧盟法问题移交欧盟法院审理，侵犯了其获得法定法官审判的宪法权利。尽管欧盟委员会曾建议移交，但德国法院维持了禁令判决，此案标志着该长期诉讼进入新的宪法审查阶段。
core_points_zh: HMD 申诉称德国最高法拒移审欧盟法问题违宪
案件核心争议在于 SEP 持有人的 FRAND 许可义务
德国宪法法院受理门槛高，此前上诉已被驳回
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧遭遇 SEP 禁令时，若遇德国法院拒绝移审欧盟法院，可评估宪法申诉路径。需密切关注德国司法对欧盟法解释权的边界，提前布局 FRAND 抗辩证据，防范因程序僵局导致的禁售风险。
insight_points_zh: 关注德国法院拒绝移审欧盟法院时的宪法救济可能
强化 FRAND 谈判记录以应对潜在禁令与违宪争议

report_items.title_zh: 欧洲专利说明书：是否必须适应权利要求内容？
report_items.title: European Patent Descriptions: To Adapt Or Not To Adapt?
report_items.summary_zh: 近年 EPO 逐步要求专利说明书须与权利要求保持一致，主要依据 EPC 第 84 条。然而上诉委员会出现分歧：部分判例支持修改，另一些则认为缺乏法律依据。鉴于异议程序中清晰度非无效理由，T697/22 案已将此法律争议提交扩大上诉委员会裁决，以明确修改义务及法律依据。
core_points_zh: EPO 依据第 84 条要求说明书与权利要求消除矛盾或不一致
上诉委员会判例存在分歧，部分认为无强制修改的法律基础
扩大上诉委员会将裁决异议及审查程序中说明书适应的必要性
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利申请需关注说明书一致性风险，尤其在异议阶段。建议提前评估权利要求修改引发的连带描述调整需求，避免因程序争议导致权利范围受限或维持困难，密切跟踪扩大上诉委最终裁定。
insight_points_zh: 警惕权利要求修改触发说明书适应性调整的合规风险
密切关注扩大上诉委裁决，及时调整欧洲专利布局策略

report_items.title_zh: 2026 年用户论坛：量子技术加速发展
report_items.title: DPMAnutzerforum 2026: Quantentechnologie nimmt Fahrt auf
report_items.summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）在 2026 年用户论坛上发布分析显示，过去十年德国市场量子技术相关专利申请量增长七倍。德国申请者数量位居全球第二，仅次于美国。DPMA 主席强调德国具备塑造关键创新的潜力，指出知识产权保护是将研究成果转化为商业模型的前提，亚洲企业在该领域亦处于领先地位。
core_points_zh: 德国量子技术专利申请十年间增长近七倍，创新动态显著
德国申请者数量居全球第二，具备塑造关键创新潜力
DPMA 强调专利保护对转化量子技术商业价值至关重要
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局量子技术时需关注德国强劲的创新势头与专利壁垒。建议加强在该领域的专利挖掘与申请，利用 DPMA 数据监测竞争对手动态，并重视知识产权合规以规避潜在侵权风险，确保在欧洲市场的技术转化安全。
insight_points_zh: 关注德国量子专利激增趋势，提前布局核心技术研发
利用官方数据监测竞争态势，强化知识产权合规管理

report_items.title_zh: 法国 INPI 公布企业知识产权手续最新费率标准
report_items.title: Tarifs des formalités d’entreprises
report_items.summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）发布关于企业手续费率的官方通知，明确相关费用依据《商法典》及 2026 年 2 月修订法令执行。该更新涉及法律信息管理部门服务报酬标准，旨在规范企业在法进行知识产权注册及变更等行政程序的缴费依据，确保费率透明度与合规性。
core_points_zh: 费率依据《商法典》及 2026 年最新修订法令确定
涵盖法律信息服务部门收取的各项行政规费标准
明确企业在法办理 IP 手续的法定缴费计算基础
report_items.insight_zh: 在法运营或申请 IP 的中国企业需关注此次费率调整，及时核算注册与维护成本。建议法务团队对照新法令更新预算，避免因费用缴纳不足导致程序延误，确保在法知识产权布局的行政流程顺畅合规。
insight_points_zh: 需依据 2026 年新法令重新核算在法 IP 申请预算
关注缴费标准变化以防行政程序因欠费被驳回

report_items.title_zh: 从奥运金牌到商标保护：克拉博姓名的商业化之路
report_items.title: Van olympisch goud naar merkbescherming: de naam Johannes Høsflot Klæbo als commercieel merk
report_items.summary_zh: 挪威滑雪名将克拉博虽已在本国注册姓名商标，但面临粉丝主席抢先注册“粉丝俱乐部”商标的挑战。文章分析指出，尽管接受该申请可维系粉丝关系，但将削弱运动员对姓名的独占控制权，阻碍未来商业谈判并引发公众混淆，建议谨慎处理以保全核心商业资产。
core_points_zh: 克拉博需在挪威之外扩展商标布局以匹配其国际知名度
第三方注册近似商标将限制权利人对姓名的独占话语权
容忍粉丝注册虽显善意，但埋下未来商业授权的法律隐患
report_items.insight_zh: 中国体育明星及品牌出海时，应提前在目标市场全类注册姓名商标，防范粉丝或关联方抢注。需明确界定官方与民间使用边界，避免因情感因素让渡核心知识产权，确保商业开发的独占性与主动权。
insight_points_zh: 名人姓名须作为核心资产进行全球前瞻性商标布局
警惕关联方善意抢注，避免丧失品牌控制的法律基础

report_items.title_zh: 超级碗与奥运会：如何在不侵犯商标权前提下借势营销
report_items.title: Super Bowl, Jeux olympiques & Coupe du Monde : comment marquer des points sans enfreindre le droit des marques ?
report_items.summary_zh: 本文分析企业在超级碗、奥运会等大型体育赛事期间进行营销的法律边界。指出赛事名称多为注册商标，受欧盟及比荷卢法律严格保护。未经授权使用官方术语或暗示关联构成侵权，即便无混淆风险，若不当利用声誉亦违规。引用 CJEU 判例强调禁止“搭便车”行为。
core_points_zh: 赛事名称属注册商标，非通用描述性词汇，商业使用需授权
即使无混淆可能，不当利用知名商标声誉仍构成侵权
严禁使用“官方”、“赞助”等词汇暗示未获授权的合作伙伴关系
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧推广时应避免蹭热点式营销，慎用赛事名称及 Logo。建议开展合规审查，确保宣传文案不暗示官方关联，防止因隐性营销遭起诉，损害品牌声誉并面临高额赔偿。
insight_points_zh: 借势营销须严守界限，避免暗示官方合作引发侵权诉讼
建立事前合规筛查机制，规避滥用知名赛事商标声誉风险

report_items.title_zh: 欧洲专利：是否必须调整说明书以匹配权利要求？
report_items.title: Brevets Européens : Faut-il Adapter La Description ?
report_items.summary_zh: 欧洲专利局近年要求说明书须与权利要求一致，主要依据 EPC 第 84 条。然而上诉委员会判例存在分歧：部分支持修改，部分认为缺乏法律依据。鉴于异议程序中清晰度非无效理由，T697/22 号案件已将此法律争议提交大上诉委员会，等待最终裁决以统一审查标准。
core_points_zh: EPO 依据第 84 条要求说明书与权利要求保持一致性
上诉委员会判例分裂，对修改说明书的法律基础存疑
大上诉委员会将裁决异议及审查程序中是否必须调整描述
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利申请需关注说明书一致性风险，尤其在异议阶段。建议提前排查描述与权利要求冲突，避免因大上诉委员会未来不利裁决导致专利范围受限或维持困难，应制定灵活应对策略。
insight_points_zh: 警惕说明书与权利要求不一致引发的审查或异议风险
密切关注大上诉委员会裁决以调整欧洲专利布局策略

report_items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局修订 PACE 计划：2026 年 2 月起仅限加速审查
report_items.title: [Blog] Révision du programme PACE : effet au 1er février 2026
report_items.summary_zh: 自 2015 年起，欧洲专利局致力于缩短检索报告发出时间，2024 年平均耗时已降至 5.5 个月。鉴于此效率提升，欧专局决定自 2026 年 2 月 1 日起修订 PACE 加速程序，将其适用范围限制在实质审查阶段。自此，申请人将无法再请求加速检索过程，但仍可加速获取首次审查意见及授权通知。
core_points_zh: 欧专局因检索效率显著提升，决定收缩 PACE 计划适用范围
自 2026 年 2 月 1 日起，PACE 程序不再支持加速检索阶段请求
修订后 PACE 仅保留加速实质审查及后续授权通知的功能
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利申请需调整策略，不再能依赖 PACE 加速检索。建议利用现有检索速度优势，提前布局实审阶段的加速请求，以平衡整体获权周期，避免因规则变更导致的时间预期偏差。
insight_points_zh: 取消检索加速选项，要求企业重新规划欧专申请的时间表
应聚焦实审阶段加速策略，以应对新规则下的审查节奏变化

weekly_report.headline_zh: UPC 管辖权收紧与 EPO 审查新规重塑欧洲 IP 格局
weekly_report.headline_en: UPC Jurisdiction Tightens and EPO Rules Reshape Europe IP
weekly_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲 IP 态势呈现司法与行政双向调整。UPC 上诉法院明确驳回长臂管辖至非成员国，确立宽泛目的性解释原则，同时推动法官闭门会议以统一裁判标准。EPO 方面，G1/25 案初步意见强化说明书一致性要求，并收缩 PACE 加速范围。此外，英欧软件专利标准趋同，量子技术专利激增，企业需警惕合规与布局新风险。
key_moves: UPC 上诉法院否定对非成员国的长臂管辖，但确立宽泛目的性权利要求解释原则
EPO 扩大上诉委 G1/25 案初步意见：说明书须随权利要求修改以消除不一致
英国最高法院废除 Aerotel 测试，软件专利审查标准向欧洲体系靠拢
德国量子专利申请十年增七倍，EUIPO 申请量创历史新高预示审查积压
business_actions: 重新评估涉欧诉讼策略，利用 UPC 管辖权界限规避非成员国连带风险
排查在审欧专申请，确保说明书与权利要求严格一致以应对 G1/25 裁决
借英欧标准趋同窗口，重启此前在英国被驳回的 AI 或软件专利申请
watchlist: EPO 扩大上诉委员会关于 G1/25 案的最终裁决（预计 2026 年 5 月）
威尼斯法官临时会议是否召开及其对 UPC 裁判风向的隐性影响
欧盟法院对 UPC 首起先决裁决请求的回应及长臂管辖最终界定

report_items.title_zh: EPO 主席访保加利亚共商欧洲专利体系未来
report_items.title: EPO President visits Bulgaria to discuss the future of Europe’s patent system
report_items.summary_zh: EPO 主席坎皮诺斯访问保加利亚，出席高水平知识产权会议并发表主旨演讲，强调专利对竞争力的关键作用。期间与保加利亚经济部长及专利局主席会晤，就应对新兴技术、优化专利服务及欧洲专利网络现代化交换意见，旨在强化欧洲创新生态系统，并表彰当地杰出发明人。
core_points_zh: EPO 主席强调专利是将创意转化为资产及确立法律确定性的关键
双方就应对新兴技术及全球价值链演变下的专利服务需求展开磋商
EPO 与保加利亚专利局承诺加强合作，推动数字转型以支持小微企业
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局需关注 EPO 与各成员国协同优化的服务趋势，特别是针对小微企业的支持政策。建议利用 EPO 数字化进程提升申请效率，并积极参与相关咨询机制，以适应不断演进的欧洲专利生态。
insight_points_zh: 关注 EPO 与成员国协同优化专利服务，利好中小企海外布局
利用 EPO 数字化转型契机，提升在欧专利申请的质量与效率

report_items.title_zh: 呼吁亟需召开威尼斯法官临时会议
report_items.title: “An interim Venice judges’ conference is desperately needed”
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出每年十月举行的威尼斯欧洲法官论坛是专利法官闭门交流思想的重要平台，律师通常被排除在外。鉴于当前欧洲专利诉讼环境变化，评论强调亟需召开一次临时会议，以确保法官间能继续就关键程序与裁判标准进行非公开的深度沟通，维护司法一致性。
core_points_zh: 威尼斯会议是欧洲专利法官闭门交流的核心年度机制
文章呼吁打破常规，亟需增加一次临时法官会议
旨在通过非公开对话解决当前专利诉讼中的分歧
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业应关注欧洲专利法官内部协调动态，这可能预示 UPC 裁判标准的微调。建议密切跟踪会议后续成果，评估对在建案件的影响，并提前调整诉讼策略以应对潜在的司法倾向变化。
insight_points_zh: 法官闭门会议可能引发 UPC 裁判标准的隐性调整
在欧中企需动态监控司法风向并优化诉讼布局

report_items.title_zh: 欧盟法院：受制裁人控股公司资产可被冻结
report_items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-84/24 EM System
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟法院就 C-84/24 案作出判决，裁定即便公司未列入制裁名单，若其由受制裁自然人控制（如持股 50%），其资产亦可被冻结。法院强调“控制”概念需广义解释，涵盖直接与间接影响，并确立 50% 持股即推定控制的规则，以确保制裁措施的有效性与突发性，防止规避行为。
core_points_zh: 未列名公司若由受制裁人控制，其资产同样适用冻结措施
持有公司 50% 股份即被法律推定为拥有控制权及资源支配力
控制概念须广义解释，包含直接及间接影响资金使用的各种方式
report_items.insight_zh: 在欧中企需严格审查股东结构，避免因关联受制裁主体导致资产被冻。建议建立实时合规筛查机制，评估间接持股风险，确保不被推定为受控实体，保障资金链安全。
insight_points_zh: 严查股权穿透，避免因关联方受制裁而触发资产冻结风险
建立动态合规监测，防范因持股比例达标被推定受控的后果

report_items.title_zh: EPO 采用欧洲研发的尖端 AI 解决方案
report_items.title: EPO adopts cutting-edge AI solution developed in Europe
report_items.summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）宣布与 Mistral AI 达成战略合作，共同开发并部署集成先进光学字符识别（OCR）技术的解决方案。该举措旨在解决专利文件中公式、化学结构等复杂元素的提取难题，提升多语言数据处理精度。此举不仅强化了欧洲数字主权，确保敏感数据符合欧盟法律与伦理框架，也标志着 EPO 在 2028 战略计划下加速数字化转型的决心。
core_points_zh: EPO 携手 Mistral AI 定制开发专用 OCR 模型，显著提升复杂专利文档的…
项目坚持欧洲本土研发与部署，确保敏感专利信息处理符合欧盟法律及伦理监管框架
该合作是 EPO 落实人工智能政策及 2028 战略规划的关键步骤，旨在构建稳健的数字…
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利申请将受益于更高效的审查流程，但需关注 EPO 对 AI 生成内容的合规要求。建议企业提前优化申请文件格式以适应新 OCR 系统，并密切关注 EPO 关于 AI 辅助审查的最新指南，确保申请策略符合欧洲数据主权趋势。
insight_points_zh: 利用 EPO 新 OCR 技术红利，优化申请文件排版以提升机器读取效率，加速审查进程
警惕欧洲数据主权趋势，确保在使用 AI 工具准备申请材料时符合欧盟合规与伦理标准

report_items.title_zh: InterDigital 诉亚马逊：全球专利升级时间线
report_items.title: InterDigital vs Amazon – A chronology of the escalation
report_items.summary_zh: InterDigital 在德国、美国、巴西及统一专利法院（UPC）起诉亚马逊，指控其 FireTV 和 Kindle 等设备及服务侵犯十项涉及视频压缩与 HDR 技术的专利。本案凸显跨国专利巨头利用欧洲新司法架构进行全球维权策略的升级，是观察 UPC 实务的重要案例。
core_points_zh: InterDigital 在四国及 UPC 发起针对亚马逊的专利侵权诉讼
涉案专利聚焦视频内容压缩及高动态范围图像质量改进技术
诉讼涵盖硬件设备与相关服务，体现全链条维权策略
report_items.insight_zh: 中国出海企业需警惕 NPE 利用 UPC 机制发起泛欧禁令风险。建议提前开展视频编码等领域 FTO 分析，评估专利稳定性，并制定包含无效宣告与和解谈判的综合应对预案，避免市场准入受阻。
insight_points_zh: 警惕 NPE 利用 UPC 单一判决覆盖多国市场的禁令风险
涉视频技术出口企业应强化 FTO 分析与无效证据储备

report_items.title_zh: HMD 就 VoiceAge 案向德国宪法法院提起违宪申诉
report_items.title: VoiceAge vs HMD saga continues with constitutional complaint
report_items.summary_zh: 芬兰 HMD Global 因与 VoiceAgeEVS 的标准必要专利纠纷，向德国联邦宪法法院提起申诉。HMD 指控德国联邦最高法院拒绝将 FRAND 许可义务的关键欧盟法问题移交欧盟法院审理，侵犯了其获得法定法官审判的宪法权利。尽管欧盟委员会曾建议移交，但德国法院维持了禁令判决，此案标志着该长期诉讼进入新的宪法审查阶段。
core_points_zh: HMD 申诉称德国最高法拒移审欧盟法问题违宪
案件核心争议在于 SEP 持有人的 FRAND 许可义务
德国宪法法院受理门槛高，此前上诉已被驳回
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧遭遇 SEP 禁令时，若遇德国法院拒绝移审欧盟法院，可评估宪法申诉路径。需密切关注德国司法对欧盟法解释权的边界，提前布局 FRAND 抗辩证据，防范因程序僵局导致的禁售风险。
insight_points_zh: 关注德国法院拒绝移审欧盟法院时的宪法救济可能
强化 FRAND 谈判记录以应对潜在禁令与违宪争议

report_items.title_zh: 指南：知识产权局 2026 年 4 月 1 日起实施新费率
report_items.title: Guidance: Intellectual Property Office: new fees from 1 April 2026
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布官方指南，明确自 2026 年 4 月 1 日起将调整专利、商标及外观设计的官方收费标准。该文件旨在指导企业了解新费率的具体适用范围与计算方式，属于程序性行政更新。此次调整覆盖三大主要知识产权领域，要求相关权利人提前规划预算，以应对即将到来的费用变更，确保申请与维护流程的连续性。
core_points_zh: 英国知识产权局确立 2026 年 4 月为新费率生效节点
新标准全面覆盖专利、商标及外观设计三类业务
官方发布指南旨在协助企业理解费用适用规则
report_items.insight_zh: 在英布局的中国企业需立即启动 2026 财年 IP 预算重估，重点关注维持费与申请费涨幅。建议利用窗口期加速 pending 案件处理，并审查长期组合持有成本，避免因费率调整导致非核心资产被动放弃或资金链紧张。
insight_points_zh: 提前重估 2026 年在英 IP 维护与申请专项预算
利用窗口期加速待决案件处理以锁定旧费率

report_items.title_zh: 欧洲专利说明书：是否必须适应权利要求内容？
report_items.title: European Patent Descriptions: To Adapt Or Not To Adapt?
report_items.summary_zh: 近年 EPO 逐步要求专利说明书须与权利要求保持一致，主要依据 EPC 第 84 条。然而上诉委员会出现分歧：部分判例支持修改，另一些则认为缺乏法律依据。鉴于异议程序中清晰度非无效理由，T697/22 案已将此法律争议提交扩大上诉委员会裁决，以明确修改义务及法律依据。
core_points_zh: EPO 依据第 84 条要求说明书与权利要求消除矛盾或不一致
上诉委员会判例存在分歧，部分认为无强制修改的法律基础
扩大上诉委员会将裁决异议及审查程序中说明书适应的必要性
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利申请需关注说明书一致性风险，尤其在异议阶段。建议提前评估权利要求修改引发的连带描述调整需求，避免因程序争议导致权利范围受限或维持困难，密切跟踪扩大上诉委最终裁定。
insight_points_zh: 警惕权利要求修改触发说明书适应性调整的合规风险
密切关注扩大上诉委裁决，及时调整欧洲专利布局策略

report_items.title_zh: 2026 年用户论坛：量子技术加速发展
report_items.title: DPMAnutzerforum 2026: Quantentechnologie nimmt Fahrt auf
report_items.summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）在 2026 年用户论坛上发布分析显示，过去十年德国市场量子技术相关专利申请量增长七倍。德国申请者数量位居全球第二，仅次于美国。DPMA 主席强调德国具备塑造关键创新的潜力，指出知识产权保护是将研究成果转化为商业模型的前提，亚洲企业在该领域亦处于领先地位。
core_points_zh: 德国量子技术专利申请十年间增长近七倍，创新动态显著
德国申请者数量居全球第二，具备塑造关键创新潜力
DPMA 强调专利保护对转化量子技术商业价值至关重要
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局量子技术时需关注德国强劲的创新势头与专利壁垒。建议加强在该领域的专利挖掘与申请，利用 DPMA 数据监测竞争对手动态，并重视知识产权合规以规避潜在侵权风险，确保在欧洲市场的技术转化安全。
insight_points_zh: 关注德国量子专利激增趋势，提前布局核心技术研发
利用官方数据监测竞争态势，强化知识产权合规管理

report_items.title_zh: 法国 INPI 公布企业知识产权手续最新费率标准
report_items.title: Tarifs des formalités d’entreprises
report_items.summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）发布关于企业手续费率的官方通知，明确相关费用依据《商法典》及 2026 年 2 月修订法令执行。该更新涉及法律信息管理部门服务报酬标准，旨在规范企业在法进行知识产权注册及变更等行政程序的缴费依据，确保费率透明度与合规性。
core_points_zh: 费率依据《商法典》及 2026 年最新修订法令确定
涵盖法律信息服务部门收取的各项行政规费标准
明确企业在法办理 IP 手续的法定缴费计算基础
report_items.insight_zh: 在法运营或申请 IP 的中国企业需关注此次费率调整，及时核算注册与维护成本。建议法务团队对照新法令更新预算，避免因费用缴纳不足导致程序延误，确保在法知识产权布局的行政流程顺畅合规。
insight_points_zh: 需依据 2026 年新法令重新核算在法 IP 申请预算
关注缴费标准变化以防行政程序因欠费被驳回

topics.headline_zh: UPC 扩容提速，中企诉讼策略需升级
topics.summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）通过增设审判庭与法官扩容显著提升结案效率，杜塞尔多夫等分院诉讼活跃度激增。AI 技术引入审查与口头程序加速流程，而长臂管辖权争议及 SEP 案件频发凸显跨境风险。中企面临从被动应诉向主动维权转变的关键窗口，需重构泛欧风控体系。
key_points: UPC 杜塞尔多夫增设第二审判庭且法官扩容，诉讼产能释放导致审理节奏显著加快。
EPO 将 AI 辅助笔录扩展至口头程序，审查与诉讼流程智能化提速，对证据精准度要求更高。
SEP 成为 UPC 新战场，爱立信发起首例物联网诉讼，长臂管辖权边界引发司法博弈。
actions: 针对德国等高活跃分院建立快速应诉机制，提前储备无效证据以应对加速审理。
利用 UPC 统一裁判机制主动发起高价值专利诉讼，降低多国维权成本并确立行业地位。
构建泛欧 FRAND 合规证据链，针对物联网等新兴领域开展专项 FTO 分析与风险排查。
watchlist: CJEU 关于 UPC 长臂管辖权的初步裁决结果及其对跨境执法范围的影响。
威尼斯法官临时会议可能引发的裁判标准隐性调整与司法风向变化。
美欧在 SEP 禁令救济上的政策分歧及美国专利观察名单带来的地缘政治风险。

topics.headline_zh: 欧 SEP 诉讼收紧：德严英争与 UPC 崛起
topics.headline_en: Europe SEP Crackdown: Germany Strict, UK Disputes, UPC Rise
topics.summary_zh: 欧洲 SEP 执法环境剧变，德国法院重构 FRAND 规则并强化禁令执行，英国管辖权争议加剧，UPC 成为新战场。欧盟监管改革与地缘博弈叠加，中企面临高额罚金与全球费率裁决风险，亟需升级合规谈判与多法域应诉策略。
key_points: 德国法院重塑 FRAND 判定标准，严格审查被许可人意愿，禁令风险显著上升。
英国与 UPC 管辖权博弈激烈，全球费率裁决与地域禁令冲突成为诉讼焦点。
欧盟推进 SEP 监管改革，强制调解与数据披露新规将改变许可谈判路径。
actions: 构建多维度“许可意愿”证据链，主动提供担保以规避德国法院禁令风险。
建立英、德、UPC 多法域协同应对机制，利用管辖权异议争取谈判空间。
清洗内部专利数据并建立可比许可数据库，以精准数据支撑 FRAND 抗辩。
watchlist: 德国宪法法院对 VoiceAge 诉 HMD 案违宪申诉的最终裁定及其连锁反应。
欧盟 SEP 监管改革提案落地进度及强制调解程序的具体实施规则。
UPC 巴黎分院在 Sun 诉 Vivo 案中确立的在线销售管辖权扩张趋势。

sep_ai_analysis.summary_zh: SEP 长窗从 2025.01 累计到现在，共识别 120 条高相关信号。近120天里，许可动作占比最高，欧洲层面仍是最活跃场域。
sep_ai_analysis.summary_en: The SEP long window now spans from Jan 2025 to the present with 120 high-relevance signals. In the recent 120-day window, Licensing lead the mix and Europe-wide remains the busiest forum.

insight_cards.insight_zh: 许可动作已经从背景变量变成当前主线，说明专利池扩围、费率博弈和双边谈判正在持续抬高经营准备门槛。
insight_cards.insight_en: Licensing has moved from a background factor to the main storyline, showing pools, rate-setting, and bilateral talks are raising the preparation bar.
insight_cards.action_zh: 优先把许可覆盖、费率对标和 willing licensee 证据准备前置。
insight_cards.action_en: Front-load licence coverage checks, rate benchmarking, and willing-licensee evidence.
insight_cards.evidence_zh: 近120天 许可动作 24 / 前120天 22 / 长窗累计 86

insight_cards.insight_zh: 欧洲层面是近120天最活跃的场域，德国紧随其后，争议正在形成多法域联动。
insight_cards.insight_en: Europe-wide is the busiest forum in the recent window, with Germany close behind, pointing to multi-forum spillover.
insight_cards.action_zh: 优先盯住 欧洲层面 的裁判与程序变化，并同步观察外溢到其他法域的连锁影响。
insight_cards.action_en: Track procedural and decisional shifts in Europe-wide first, then watch for spillover into other venues.
insight_cards.evidence_zh: 欧洲层面 17 条；德国 6 条

insight_cards.insight_zh: 近120天中企相关信号共有 9 条，占近期样本 26%。重点企业包括 Oppo / Honor / Huawei。
insight_cards.insight_en: There are 9 China-related signals in the recent 120-day window, or 26% of the sample. Focus companies include Oppo / Honor / Huawei.
insight_cards.action_zh: 把许可准备、诉讼预案和客户交付协同放到同一张经营清单里，不要只按单案应对。
insight_cards.action_en: Put licensing readiness, litigation planning, and customer-delivery coordination on the same operating checklist rather than treating them as one-off disputes.

insight_cards.insight_zh: 当前约 100% 的专题样本基于全文或公开预览分析，摘要级样本主要用于补趋势，不宜单独放大解读。
insight_cards.insight_en: About 100% of the topic rests on full-text or public-preview analysis; summary-only items are mainly useful for directional trend support.
insight_cards.action_zh: 对涉及重大经营判断的节点，优先回到原文或公开预览核实，再决定是否升级为重点预警。
insight_cards.action_en: For business-critical signals, step back to the source text or public preview before escalating them into priority warnings.
insight_cards.evidence_zh: 全文 27 / 预览 93 / 摘要 0

trend_judgments: 近120天 SEP标准必要专利信号较前120天增加 7 条，整体仍在升温。
当前最强主线仍是许可动作，近120天共 24 条，说明专利池、费率与双边谈判继续主导节奏。
欧洲层面是近120天最活跃的主导法域/场域，共出现 17 条相关信号。
中企相关信号近120天共有 9 条，占近期样本 26%；当前专题中约 100% 的样本基于全文或公开预览分析。
trend_judgments_en: SEP signals are up by 7 over the prior 120 days, pointing to a still-heating window.
Licensing remains the strongest line with 24 recent signals, keeping pools, rates, and bilateral talks at the center.
Europe-wide is the most active forum in the recent 120-day window with 17 signals.
China-related signals account for 9 items, or 26% of the recent window; about 100% of the topic rests on full-text or public-preview analysis.

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.headline_zh: 欧盟执法升级与地理标志新规下的应对
topics.headline_en: EU Enforcement Surge and New GI Rules
topics.summary_zh: 本期 EUIPO 动态显示欧盟正全面升级知识产权执法，联合 Europol 打击假药及有组织犯罪，并推广 IPEP 数字工具提升扣货效率。同时，手工艺地理标志新体系正式落地，外观设计检索库扩容。司法层面明确纯功能形状不可注册商标，但认可“单点实体 + 线上”模式构成商标真实使用。
key_points: 欧盟联合多机构升级执法，利用 IPEP 数字工具强化海关对假冒商品的拦截能力。
手工艺与工业地理标志（CIGIs）咨询委员会成立，双阶段审查程序即将实施。
司法判例明确：纯功能性形状拒注，但本地服务结合网络可证成欧盟商标使用。
actions: 利用 DesignView 新版图像搜索功能，在产品设计阶段强化在先权利排查。
评估中国传统工艺品申请欧盟地理标志保护的可行性，提前布局国家初审策略。
针对在欧业务，采用“单点实体 + 电商平台”模式低成本维持欧盟商标有效性。
watchlist: 关注 EUIPO 公益法律支持项目，微型企业可申请免费维权援助。
监控欧盟打击有组织犯罪（EMPACT）行动，防范供应链合规风险。
追踪地理标志双阶段审查的具体国别名单及异议应对细则。

topics.headline_zh: 欧英升级打假执法，中企需防刑事风险
topics.headline_en: EU and UK escalate anti-counterfeit enforcement
topics.summary_zh: 2026 年初，欧盟与英国显著升级知识产权刑事执法。EUIPO 联合 Europol 打击假药及有组织犯罪，UKIPO 获长期资金扩充专项组。执法重点转向供应链合规与 AI 数据源审查。在欧中企面临更高刑事追责风险，亟需从被动应对转向主动合规，利用新机制维权并规避卷入犯罪网络。
key_points: 欧盟强化跨机构协作，EUIPO 联手 Europol/Eurojust 重点打击假药及有组织 IP 犯罪。
英国确认延长 IP 犯罪专项组资金至 2029 年，并启动公私合作试点提升执法效率。
版权执法延伸至 AI 领域，出版商起诉影子图书馆，训练数据来源合规成焦点。
actions: 立即开展供应链侵权隐患排查，建立针对假药及高危产品的专项合规审查机制。
主动对接英国 IP 犯罪专项组新试点，利用官方渠道提升维权响应速度与精准度。
严格审核 AI 研发数据源，禁止使用未授权影子图书馆资源，防范版权连带诉讼。
watchlist: 欧盟 EMPACT 网络后续发布的涉华有组织犯罪预警名单及具体案例。
英国新行业合作试点的具体准入标准及中企参与维权的实际操作流程。
五大出版商诉影子图书馆案的判决走向及其对 AI 训练数据合法性的界定。
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护

brief.headline_zh: UPC 扩容提速，中企诉讼策略需升级
brief.summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）通过增设审判庭与法官扩容显著提升结案效率，杜塞尔多夫等分院诉讼活跃度激增。AI 技术引入审查与口头程序加速流程，而长臂管辖权争议及 SEP 案件频发凸显跨境风险。中企面临从被动应诉向主动维权转变的关键窗口，需重构泛欧风控体系。
key_points: UPC 杜塞尔多夫增设第二审判庭且法官扩容，诉讼产能释放导致审理节奏显著加快。
EPO 将 AI 辅助笔录扩展至口头程序，审查与诉讼流程智能化提速，对证据精准度要求更高。
SEP 成为 UPC 新战场，爱立信发起首例物联网诉讼，长臂管辖权边界引发司法博弈。
actions: 针对德国等高活跃分院建立快速应诉机制，提前储备无效证据以应对加速审理。
利用 UPC 统一裁判机制主动发起高价值专利诉讼，降低多国维权成本并确立行业地位。
构建泛欧 FRAND 合规证据链，针对物联网等新兴领域开展专项 FTO 分析与风险排查。
watchlist: CJEU 关于 UPC 长臂管辖权的初步裁决结果及其对跨境执法范围的影响。
威尼斯法官临时会议可能引发的裁判标准隐性调整与司法风向变化。
美欧在 SEP 禁令救济上的政策分歧及美国专利观察名单带来的地缘政治风险。

items.title: AI-assisted minute-taking extended to Unitary Patent oral proceedings
items.title_zh: EPO 将 AI 辅助笔录扩展至统一专利口头程序
items.summary: EPO extends AI‑assisted minute‑taking to Unitary Patent proceedings, improving efficiency, accuracy and consistency while ensuring full human oversight and data protection
items.content: Following a successful pilot phase, the EPO is extending the use of AI to support minute-taking in oral proceedings before the Unitary Patent Protection Division (UPPD). Following the positive results of the 2025 pilot, the European Patent Office (EPO) is extending AI-assisted minute-taking to oral proceedings before the Unitary Patent Protection Division. The approach is already used in oral proceedings in examination, opposition, before the Receiving Section and the Legal Division. This step further integrates AI-supported tools into the patent-granting process, while maintaining full human oversight and responsibility for the final minutes. How AI supports the work of divisions Audio is recorded via the videoconferencing system, and a transcript is generated using an AI tool. Shortly after the oral proceedings, the transcript is processed by the division with the support of another AI tool to produce draft minutes. After review, the minutes are finalised by the division in accordance with Rule 124(3) EPC. In line with data protection and procedural safeguards, the recording and its transcription are deleted once the minutes are issued to the parties. Lessons from the 2025 pilot The pilot helped refine and accelerate transcript generation. Examination and opposition divisions reported improvements in the consistency, structure and language of minutes, which were also welcomed by parties to the proceedings. Further information
items.ai_summary_zh: 继 2025 年试点成功后，欧洲专利局（EPO）正式将 AI 辅助笔录技术应用范围扩大至统一专利保护部门（UPPD）的口头程序。该流程利用 AI 生成录音转录稿并起草会议纪要，全程保留人工最终审核权以确保准确性。此举旨在提升审查、异议及统一专利程序的效率与一致性，同时严格遵守数据保护规定，录音在纪要发布后即被删除。

items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧参与统一专利诉讼或异议时，需适应 AI 辅助的高效程序节奏。建议提前准备高质量口头陈述，利用程序一致性优势，同时关注数据隐私合规，确保在人工复核环节有效传达核心技术与法律观点。

items.title: European Patent Office meets with German Association for Intellectual Property Law
items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局与德国知识产权法协会举行双边会晤
items.summary: EPO-GRUR bilateral meeting on 2 March 2026: Recent developments, quality, unitary patent system and the Observatory were among topics discussed.
items.content: Video interview with President Dr Anke Nordemann-Schiffel On 2 March, the EPO welcomed a delegation from the German Association for Intellectual Property Law (GRUR) to its headquarters in Munich for a bilateral exchange on key developments in the European Patent System. The Vice-President for Legal and International Affairs Christoph Ernst headed the EPO delegation, welcoming GRUR representatives led by their new President, Dr Anke Nordemann-Schiffel. In line with the EPO’s commitment to structured, inclusive engagement with users, the meeting formed part of the ongoing dialogue with national and international user associations in 2026. The exchange provided an excellent opportunity to reaffirm shared priorities, take stock of the very positive results already achieved, and explore potential for continued co-operation. Quality and operational developments The EPO shared with GRUR recent insights from the Quality Action Plan 2026, published last month, highlighting the importance of user feedback in shaping its priorities. As in previous editions, the plan focuses on targeted technical training and reskilling for EPO examiners, the use of AI-powered tools to advance digital transformation, and maintaining high standards across search, examination and opposition proceedings. The GRUR delegation expressly commended the excellent quality of the EPO‘s products and services, acknowledging the high level of professionalism and reliability throughout the patent granting process. In this context, GRUR confirmed that substantial and measurable progress has been achieved, building on the direction set by the EPO’s Strategic Plans 2023 and 2028, and further consolidating the Office’s reputation for quality. Unitary Patent and strategic foresight Recent developments relating to the Unitary Patent (UP) and the Unified Patent Court (UPC) were also discussed. GRUR acknowledged the success of the UP system to date as reflected in the EPO’s contribution to the European Commission report on the operation of the Unitary patent system (Regulation (EU) No 1257/2012). Echoing the conclusions from the Draghi and Letta reports, the delegates agreed that the UP and the UPC are essential tools for deepening the Single Market and boosting the EU’s technological sovereignty. Against this backdrop, both sides shared the ambition to build on this strong success, further enhancing the attractiveness and legal certainty offered by the Unitary Patent system. The exchange then turned to the work of the EPO’s Observatory on Patents and Technology, with particular attention to the strategic foresight initiative "Scenarios for the Future 2025-2045". GRUR is among the user organisations invited to contribute to the broad consultation process with key stakeholders, which examines how the innovation landscape and the patent system may develop over the next two decades, which technologies could shape this period, and what role the patent system and patent offices will play in the future. While outcomes of the foresight project are expected in June 2027, the EPO and GRUR expressed a shared interest in continuing close co-operation in various fields both in the short and longer term. ​​GRUR President Dr Anke Nordemann-Schiffel and EPO Vice-President Christoph Ernst with their respective delegations​ About GRUR Founded in 1891, GRUR is Germany’s oldest and largest intellectual property law association and enjoys an outstanding reputation and high level of recognition among IP stakeholders across Europe and beyond. With around 5 000 members in Germany and abroad. Its purpose is the academic advancement and development of IP law at the German, European and international level. Its vast network is composed of a variety of members including patent attorneys and lawyers, judges and academics, as well as companies, business associations and their employees and representatives. A dedicated GRUR standing committee on patent and utility model law, in which the EPO holds observer status, complements the various bilateral interactions with the association. In a video interview with the EPO, GRUR President Dr Anke Nordemann-Schiffel shares further insights into the association’s mission and its vision for the future of the patent system. Further information 附件文档： - EPO’s contribution to the European Commission report on the operation of the Unitary patent system (Regulation (EU) No 1257/2012) | https://link.epo.org/web/news-events/news/operation-unitary-patent-system.pdf 附件摘录：EPO’s contribution to the European Commission report on the operation of the Unitary patent system (Regulation (EU) No 1257/2012) Operation of the Unitary Patent system Contribution by the European Patent Office to the European Commission report on the operation of Regulation (EU) No 1257/2012 November 2025 epo.org Table of Contents Executive Summary 3 1. Introduction 5 2. Key findings 6 3. Objectives of the creation of the Unitary Patent system 9 3.1 General 9 3.2 Adoption of the Unitary Patent package 11 4. Smooth integration and successful start of the new system 12 4.1 Operations 12 4.2 Fee related aspects 17 4.3 Importance and value of the Unitary Patent system for EU companies in the home market 18 5. Successful legal, technical, financial and operational implementation and strong awareness raising 20 5.1 Governance 20 5.2 Legal Implementation 21 5.3 Technical implementation 25 5.4 Financial implementation 25 5.5 Communication-related implementation and awareness raising 26 5.6 Capacity-building 27 5.7 Interactions between the UPC and the EPO 28 6. Next steps and outlook 28 7. Conclusions 29 Annex 1 31 2 Executive Summary The Unitary Patent system has transformed the landscape for Europe's innovators. In just over two years, it has delivered on its promise to simplify, streamline, and reduce the cost of patent protection and dispute settlement across Europe. The system has become a game-changer, offering businesses a one-stop shop to realise the full potential of the EU’s Single Market. With Unitary Patents, innovators can now obtain patent protection in 18 EU Member States, representing a market of over 317 million inhabitants, and benefit from simpler procedures, a single and competitive set of renewal fees and one comprehensive register. The uptake of the Unitary Patent has exceeded expectations. It is used extensively across all industrial sectors, with almost a third of European patents being now converted into Unitary Patents. Uptake rates are even higher among EU-based proprietors of European patents, at 40%. These proprietors account for over 60% of all requests. This proves the system’s attractiveness to European innovators, dispelling concerns voiced prior to its introduction that overseas users would dominate the Unitary Patent system. Furthermore, nearly 40% of all European patent holders who have requested unitary effect for their granted patents are small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and public research organisations, proving those wrong who believed that the Unitary Patent would appeal only to big business. Amongst European SMEs, there is a higher-than-average uptake rate of 66%. A similarly high uptake rate of 51% is seen among European universities and public research organisations. This figure is all the more remarkable considering that European patent applications from European SMEs and individual inventors make up 22% of the total, and 7% of the total originate from universities and public research organisations. This underscores the system's accessibility and appeal, particularly for European innovators and European SMEs. In addition, the streamlined translation regime of the Unitary Patent reflects the realities of modern technology and advances in machine translation tools. This makes technical information contained in Unitary Patents widely accessible to the public and businesses across Europe. Cooperation between the European Patent Office (EPO), participating EU Member States and the European Commission has been exemplary. This has ensured stable governance and effective administration by the EPO, a fact that was recognised by over 8 000 users in the latest independent User Satisfaction Survey. The EPO has managed the Unitary Patent related tasks within the timeliness expectations, and transparently distributed information and knowledge, for example by making all statistical data publicly available on the Unitary Patent Dashboard. The robust and adaptable institutional framework established through the Select Committee, including the adoption and subsequent amendments of the Rules relating to Unitary Patent Protection, has also proven its worth. Meanwhile, the Unified Patent Court has established itself as a fast and effective centralised forum for resolving disputes across Europe. This has enhanced legal certainty and consistency, while reducing the need for parallel proceedings. The UPC boasts Europe’s most specialised patent judges, sophisticated procedures, and advanced IT infrastructure, including a new Case Management System developed by the UPC with support from the EPO. Its steadily expanding body of balanced and high-quality case law continues to strengthen confidence in the system. The Court’s fees are comparable and competitive with those of national courts and, in view of its multinational 3 jurisdiction, cannot be regarded as disproportionately high. In addition, the UPC’s 40% fee reduction for SMEs ensures that litigation remains fully accessible to smaller entities. In summary, the Unitary Patent and the Unified Patent Court have quickly proven their worth, and the EU institutions were correct to entrust the EPO with the tasks relating to the Unitary Patent. Its implementation has proven to be effective, legally secure, of a high quality, and with business- friendly processes and costs. It is essential that all stakeholders continue to work together to support these positive trends and further enhance the attractiveness of the system. The Unitary Patent system provides the foundation for the free flow of technology in Europe, offering the legal certainty that research, investment, and scale depend on. The fragmentation of the European patent landscape sets a further bureaucratic hurdle for less-experienced users, especially for European SMEs and research institutions. It is therefore vital that all EU Member States join the Unitary Patent system so that its full potential can be realised, as emphasised in the Draghi and Letta reports and the EU's Single Market Strategy. 4 1. Introduction 1. Innovation and the protection thereof are of great importance to promot…
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026 年 3 月，EPO 与德国 GRUR 在慕尼黑会晤，聚焦专利质量行动计划、单一专利制度进展及未来技术展望。双方肯定 UP/UPC 对欧盟单一市场的价值，并就 EPO 观察站关于 2025-2045 年专利体系情景规划展开合作探讨，旨在提升法律确定性与技术创新主权。

items.title: Oath taking of newly appointed legally qualified judges
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院五名新任法律资格法官宣誓就职
items.summary: Oath taking of 5 newly appointed legally qualified judges will take place at the Local division Munich (DE), Local division The Hague (NL), the Nordic-Baltic Regional division, Local division Düsseldorf (DE) and Central division Munich (DE)
items.content: Oath taking of 5 newly appointed legally qualified judges will take place at the Local division Munich (DE), Local division The Hague (NL), the Nordic-Baltic Regional division, Local division Düsseldorf (DE) and Central division Munich (DE) Following the news from 22 December 2025 and in accordance of the decision of the Administrative Committee dated 4 November 2025 (AC/05/04112025), Ms Ina Schnurr has been appointed as legally qualified judge at the Local division Munich, Mr Robert van Peursem at the Local division The Hague, Ms Goda Ambrasaité-Balyniené at the Nordic-Baltic Regional division, Mr Ingo Rinken at the Local division Düsseldorf and Mr Thomas Adocker at the Central division Munich. Before taking up their duties, they shall take an oath in open court, in accordance with Article 6 of the Statute of the UPC. For this purpose, open court sessions will take place as follows: Local division Munich (DE): oath taking of Ms Ina Schnurr Local division The Hague (NL): oath taking of Mr Robert van Peursem Nordic-Baltic Regional division: oath taking of Ms Goda Ambrasaité-Balyniené Local division Düsseldorf (DE): oath taking of Mr Ingo Rinken Central division Munich (DE): oath taking of Mr Thomas Adocker
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）宣布五名新任法律资格法官正式任命。依据行政委员会决定，这些法官将分别在慕尼黑、海牙、北欧 - 波罗的海地区及杜塞尔多夫分院履职。在正式上任前，他们将根据《UPC 规约》第六条规定，在各自分院的公开法庭上进行宣誓，标志着 UPC 司法力量的进一步充实。

items.title: Presidium announces establishment of a second panel at Düsseldorf Local Division
items.title_zh: UPC 主席团宣布杜塞尔多夫地方分院设立第二审判庭
items.summary: The Presidium of the Unified Patent Court (UPC) has decided the establishment of a second panel at Düsseldorf Local Division (DE) as of 1 March 2026
items.content: The Presidium of the Unified Patent Court (UPC) has decided the establishment of a second panel at Düsseldorf Local Division (DE) as of 1 March 2026 Following the decision of Presidium of the UPC taken on 20 January 2026 (PR/20012026) a new panel will be set up at Local Division Düsseldorf as of 1 March 2026. Ms Bérénice Thom , legally qualified judge, has been appointed as Presiding judge of Panel 2. She will be joined on the panel by Mr Ingo Rinken , legally qualified judge. Panel 1 of the LD Düsseldorf is presided by Mr Ronny Thomas , legally qualified judge. He is joined on the panel by Ms Jule Schumacher , legally qualified judge. 附件文档： - 20 January 2026 | https://www.unifiedpatentcourt.org/sites/default/files/upc_documents/decision%20on%20presiding%20judges%20of%20panels%20DUSSEL%20MUNC%20v2.pdf 附件摘录：20 January 2026 PR/20012026 Presidium of the Unified Patent Court Designation of the Presiding Judges of Panels Local Division Düsseldorf Local Division Munich Date: 20 January 2026 Place: Luxemburg PR/20012026 DECISION OF THE PRESIDIUM OF 20 JANUARY 2026 THE PRESIDIUM OF THE UNIFIED PATENT COURT HAVING REGARD to the Agreement on a Unified Patent Court (UPCA) and in particular Article 8 thereof. HAVING REGARD to the Rules of Procedure of the Unified Patent Court and in particular R.341.4 thereof. HAS ADOPTED THE FOLLOWING DECISION: Article 1 The Presiding judges of the Panels of the Local Division Düsseldorf are designated as follows: Panel 1: Mr. Ronny Thomas Panel 2: Ms. Berenice Thom The Presiding judges of the Panels of the Local Division Munich are designated as follows: Panel 1: Mr. Matthias Zigann Panel 2: Mr. Daniel Voss Article 2 The present decision will enter into force as of 1 March 2026. Done at Luxembourg on 20 January 2026 For the Presidium signed Klaus Grabinski The Chairman
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）主席团决定自 2026 年 3 月 1 日起，在杜塞尔多夫地方分院设立第二个审判庭。该决定基于 2026 年 1 月 20 日的决议，旨在应对案件增长。Bérénice Thom 法官被任命为第二审判庭审判长，与 Ingo Rinken 法官共同履职；原第一审判庭由 Ronny Thomas 法官继续领导。此举标志着 UPC 在德国关键司法辖区的审理能力显著增强。

items.ai_insight_zh: 杜塞尔多夫是欧洲专利诉讼重镇，增设审判庭意味着案件处理效率提升但诉讼风险亦增。在欧中国企业需重新评估当地诉讼策略，加强专利稳定性分析，并密切关注新审判庭的判例倾向，以防范潜在侵权纠纷。

items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）宣布恢复月度统计数据发布，并启用新格式以提供更清晰的洞察。截至 2026 年 2 月 28 日，一审法院共受理案件 1130 起，其中 2026 年前两个月新增 72 起。数据显示德国杜塞尔多夫和慕尼黑分院案件量领先，英语为最主要诉讼语言。新数据涵盖侵权、无效及临时措施等细分类型，全面展示法院活动趋势。

items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业需密切关注 UPC 诉讼高地（如杜塞尔多夫）的动态，提前布局应对策略。鉴于英语案件占比高，建议提升涉外诉讼语言能力，并利用公开数据分析竞争对手在欧专利布局与诉讼倾向，优化风险防控。

items.title: EPO meets with Novartis
items.title_zh: EPO 与诺华举行会议探讨专利审查时效与统一专利体系
items.summary: On 4 February, the European Patent Office (EPO) held an online meeting with the Swiss pharmaceutical and biotechnology company Novartis.
items.content: On 4 February, the European Patent Office (EPO) held an online meeting with the Swiss pharmaceutical and biotechnology company Novartis. The exchanges, which form part of the EPO’s structured engagement with large applicants, marked the fourth bilateral meeting of this kind in 2026 and the 110 th since the EPO first launched its initiative to deepen user dialogue in 2021. The Novartis delegation was led by Head of Commercial IP Marco Riensche and included more than 20 representatives based at the company’s headquarters in Basel, as well as in the United States and the United Kingdom. The EPO delegation was led by Vice-President Patent Granting Process Steve Rowan, supported by managers and experts working in the fields of pharmaceuticals, biotechnology and patent law. Filing trends and investment considerations Novartis representatives emphasised timeliness of patent examination as being critical for companies’ investment decisions, especially with regard to new formulations and dosage regimens, as well as further medical uses. As Mr. Riensche emphasised, " a timely decision on whether a patent will be granted or upheld is crucial for planning and investment decisions" . Unitary Patent and supplementary protection certificates Novartis maintains a cautious but positive approach to the Unitary Patent, and representatives expressed strong support for a centralised supplementary protection certificate system with invalidity requests and appeals handled in the Unified Patent Court. They highlighted the benefits of EU-wide consistency, as well as streamlined procedures and agreed that the EPO is a suitable authority to implement such a system. Feedback on the latest Guidelines Recent revisions to the Guidelines for Examination regarding antibody-related patent applications were also discussed. The EPO highlighted the public online consultation that commences in the first quarter of every year, offering all users the opportunity to submit feedback on the preview versions of each set of Guidelines, ahead of their entry into force on 1 April. Dialogue continues Mr Riensche thanked the EPO for the constructive meeting and welcomed continued dialogue, noting that “ there is still much more to discuss .” About Novartis Novartis is a global pharmaceutical company with a strong research focus. In the Patent Index for 2024, Novartis ranked 13 th among Swiss applicants at the EPO, with 120 filings. In 2025, Novartis invested more than USD 10 billion in research and development and employed more than 20 000 R&D staff worldwide, with a significant footprint in Europe (more than 9 000 R&D staff). The company has the third-largest drug pipeline among pharmaceutical companies globally and maintains an in-house IP team of around 80 patent attorneys worldwide. Further information
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026 年 2 月 4 日，欧洲专利局（EPO）与瑞士诺华公司举行线上会议，重点讨论专利审查时效对投资决策的关键影响。双方就统一专利制度及建立集中化补充保护证书（SPC）体系交换意见，诺华支持由 EPO 实施该体系并交由统一专利法院处理无效诉讼。此外，会议还涉及抗体相关专利申请审查指南的修订反馈机制。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["诺华强调专利审查时效性直接决定新药研发投资决策", "支持建立集中化 SPC 体系，主张由统一专利法院管辖无效上诉", "双方就抗体专利审查指南修订及公众咨询机制进行深入交流"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国药企应关注欧洲专利审查提速趋势，优化布局策略。同时需重视统一专利法院在 SPC 纠纷中的核心地位，提前构建应对集中化无效挑战的预案，利用指南修订窗口期提升申请质量。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["借势审查提速机制，加速高价值医药专利在欧洲的授权落地", "针对集中化 SPC 体系，预演统一专利法院的无效抗辩与诉讼策略"]

items.title: Upcoming changes to judicial compositions of the Court of Appeal and the Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉院及巴黎一审分部法官组成变更公告
items.summary: The Court informs on changes to the judicial compositions of the Court of Appeal and Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, effective as of 1 April 2026
items.content: The Court informs on changes to the judicial compositions of the Court of Appeal and Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, effective as of 1 April 2026 Following the retirement of Ms Emanuela Germano, legally qualified judge at the Court of Appeal, at the end of March 2026, the Administrative Committee, by decision D-AC/03/02072025 of 2 July 2025, nominated Mr Paolo Catallozzi, legally qualified judge at the Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, to be appointed as legally qualified judge of the Court of Appeal as of 1 April 2026. Following the promotion of Mr Paolo Catallozzi to the Court of Appeal, the Administrative Committee also decided on 2 July 2025 (D-AC/04/02072025) to appoint Mr Vincenzo Carn ì as legally qualified judge as of 1 April 2026. The President of the Court of Appeal, Mr Klaus Grabinski and the President of the Court of First Instance, Ms Florence Butin, thank Ms Germano for her valuable work for the Court of Appeal and wish her an enjoyable retirement. The Presidents wish Mr Catallozzi a successful start in his new position at the Court of Appeal and Mr Carnì a warm welcome to the Court of First Instance.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院宣布自 2026 年 4 月 1 日起调整司法人员组成。因上诉院法官 Germano 退休，原巴黎中央分部一审法官 Catallozzi 晋升至上诉院；同时任命 Carnì为新任巴黎一审法官。该决定由行政委员会于 2025 年 7 月作出，旨在确保法院审判工作的连续性与稳定性。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉院法官 Germano 将于 2026 年 3 月底正式退休离任", "Catallozzi 从巴黎一审分部晋升至上诉院，2026 年 4 月生效", "行政委员会任命 Carnì填补巴黎一审分部法官空缺"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 法官更替可能影响特定技术领域的审判风格与倾向性。在欧中企需关注新任法官背景，评估对未决案件或未来诉讼策略的潜在影响，适时调整法律团队配置以应对巴黎分部的司法实践变化。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注新任法官专业背景，预判其对专利有效性及侵权判定的倾向", "针对巴黎分部案件，建议重新评估诉讼策略与证据准备重点"]

items.title: “An interim Venice judges’ conference is desperately needed”
items.title_zh: 呼吁亟需召开威尼斯法官临时会议
items.summary: Once a year in October, European patent judges meet in Venice for the European Judges’ Forum. The idea behind the so-called Venice conference is for judges to engage in a friendly exchange of ideas behind closed doors. Lawyers and other patent experts are only admitted in exceptional cases. Unlike other conferences, where publicity is high […] The post “An interim Venice judges’ conference is desperately needed” appeared first on JUVE Patent .

items.ai_summary_zh: 文章指出每年十月举行的威尼斯欧洲法官论坛是专利法官闭门交流思想的重要平台，律师通常被排除在外。鉴于当前欧洲专利诉讼环境变化，评论强调亟需召开一次临时会议，以确保法官间能继续就关键程序与裁判标准进行非公开的深度沟通，维护司法一致性。

items.title: InterDigital vs Amazon – A chronology of the escalation
items.title_zh: InterDigital 诉亚马逊：全球专利升级时间线
items.summary: InterDigital is suing for the infringement of ten patents in courts across Germany, the US, Brazil and the UPC. All patents-in-suit relate to video content compression and picture quality improvement through high dynamic range (HDR) technology. InterDigital claims Amazon infringes these patents with devices such as FireTV and Kindle, as well as through its services […] The post InterDigital vs Amazon – A chronology of the escalation appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.content: InterDigital is suing for the infringement of ten patents in courts across Germany, the US, Brazil and the UPC. All patents-in-suit relate to video content compression and picture quality improvement through high dynamic range (HDR) technology. InterDigital claims Amazon infringes these patents with devices such as FireTV and Kindle, as well as through its services […] The post InterDigital vs Amazon – A chronology of the escalation appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: InterDigital 在德国、美国、巴西及统一专利法院（UPC）起诉亚马逊，指控其 FireTV 和 Kindle 等设备及服务侵犯十项涉及视频压缩与 HDR 技术的专利。本案凸显跨国专利巨头利用欧洲新司法架构进行全球维权策略的升级，是观察 UPC 实务的重要案例。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["InterDigital 在四国及 UPC 发起针对亚马逊的专利侵权诉讼", "涉案专利聚焦视频内容压缩及高动态范围图像质量改进技术", "诉讼涵盖硬件设备与相关服务，体现全链条维权策略"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海企业需警惕 NPE 利用 UPC 机制发起泛欧禁令风险。建议提前开展视频编码等领域 FTO 分析，评估专利稳定性，并制定包含无效宣告与和解谈判的综合应对预案，避免市场准入受阻。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕 NPE 利用 UPC 单一判决覆盖多国市场的禁令风险", "涉视频技术出口企业应强化 FTO 分析与无效证据储备"]

items.title: Amgen vs Sanofi – A chronology of the patent battle over Repatha and Praluent
items.title_zh: 安进对阵赛诺菲：Repatha 与 Praluent 专利战编年史
items.summary: JUVE Patent followed the dispute between Amgen on the one side and Sanofi and Regeneron on the other over cholesterol-lowering drugs for many years. At the heart of the case are the two drugs Repatha and Praluent. While Amgen markets Repatha with the active ingredient evolocumab, Sanofi markets Praluent with the active ingredient alirocumab. Both are […] The post Amgen vs Sanofi – A chronology of the patent battle over Repatha and Praluent appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.content: JUVE Patent followed the dispute between Amgen on the one side and Sanofi and Regeneron on the other over cholesterol-lowering drugs for many years. At the heart of the case are the two drugs Repatha and Praluent. While Amgen markets Repatha with the active ingredient evolocumab, Sanofi markets Praluent with the active ingredient alirocumab. Both are […] The post Amgen vs Sanofi – A chronology of the patent battle over Repatha and Praluent appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文梳理了安进与赛诺菲、再生元之间关于降胆固醇药物 Repatha 和 Praluent 的长期专利纠纷。案件核心涉及两种 PCSK9 抑制剂活性成分的专利有效性及侵权认定。该争端横跨多国司法辖区，并已成为检验欧洲统一专利法院（UPC）处理复杂生物医药专利能力的标志性案例，对行业竞争格局影响深远。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["安进与赛诺菲就两款降脂药展开多年跨国专利攻防", "案件焦点在于 evolocumab 与 alirocumab 成分专利效力", "该诉讼是观察 UPC 审理高价值医药专利案的关键窗口"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国药企出海需警惕类似 PCSK9 靶点专利雷区，提前开展 FTO 分析。建议密切关注 UPC 判例走向，利用其统一裁决机制降低多国应诉成本，制定灵活的欧洲专利布局与许可策略。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["出海药企应针对热门靶点提前进行自由实施尽职调查", "利用 UPC 统一诉讼机制可有效降低欧洲多国维权成本"]

案件焦点在于 evolocumab 与 alirocumab 成分专利效力
该诉讼是观察 UPC 审理高价值医药专利案的关键窗口

items.title: Dispute between ParTec and Nvidia threatens to escalate after dismissal
items.title_zh: ParTec 诉英伟达案被驳回后争端或升级
items.summary: Today’s decision concerns one of three lawsuits filed by ParTec against the US chip giant at the Unified Patent Court. ParTec is backed by former IPCom founder Bernhard Frohwitter. ParTec claims infringement of EP 3 743 812 and sought an injunction requiring Nvidia to refrain from distributing essential products of its GPU product portfolio in […] The post Dispute between ParTec and Nvidia threatens to escalate after dismissal appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.content: Today’s decision concerns one of three lawsuits filed by ParTec against the US chip giant at the Unified Patent Court. ParTec is backed by former IPCom founder Bernhard Frohwitter. ParTec claims infringement of EP 3 743 812 and sought an injunction requiring Nvidia to refrain from distributing essential products of its GPU product portfolio in […] The post Dispute between ParTec and Nvidia threatens to escalate after dismissal appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）驳回了 ParTec 针对英伟达提起的三项诉讼之一。ParTec 由前 IPCom 创始人支持，指控英伟达 GPU 产品组合侵犯其 EP3743812 号专利并寻求禁令。此次败诉可能导致双方争端进一步升级，凸显 UPC 在芯片领域专利执法中的关键角色及诉讼风险。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 驳回 ParTec 对英伟达的部分专利侵权诉讼请求", "涉案专利为 EP3743812，争议焦点涉及 GPU 核心产品分销", "诉讼失利可能促使原告采取更激进策略，争端面临升级风险"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国芯片及硬件出口企业应高度关注 UPC 判例走向，评估自身产品在欧洲的侵权风险。建议在进入欧洲市场前进行严格的 FTO 分析，并针对高价值专利提前布局防御性策略或许可谈判，避免陷入高额禁令风险。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["重视 UPC 裁判趋势，提前开展欧洲市场专利自由实施分析", "针对核心产品建立防御性专利组合或预备许可谈判方案"]

items.title: Amgen and Sanofi end epic battle over Praluent and Repatha
items.title_zh: 安进与赛诺菲终结 Praluent 与 Repatha 专利史诗之战
items.summary: The dispute between Amgen on the one side and Sanofi and Regeneron on the other is probably one of the longest and most intense patent disputes in recent history. Both sides offer cholesterol-lowering drugs. Amgen sells its PCSK9 inhibitor Repatha with the active ingredient evolocumab. Sanofi and Regeneron market their drug under the brand name […] The post Amgen and Sanofi end epic battle over Praluent and Repatha appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.content: The dispute between Amgen on the one side and Sanofi and Regeneron on the other is probably one of the longest and most intense patent disputes in recent history. Both sides offer cholesterol-lowering drugs. Amgen sells its PCSK9 inhibitor Repatha with the active ingredient evolocumab. Sanofi and Regeneron market their drug under the brand name […] The post Amgen and Sanofi end epic battle over Praluent and Repatha appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 安进与赛诺菲及再生元之间关于降胆固醇药物 Repatha 和 Praluent 的长期专利纠纷宣告结束。该案被视为近年最激烈的专利战之一，双方最终达成和解。此动态发生在统一专利法院（UPC）运作背景下，标志着欧洲生物医药领域重大不确定性消除，对后续类似案件具有风向标意义。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["安进与赛诺菲终结长达多年的 PCSK9 抑制剂专利争端", "双方和解消除了欧洲市场关键生物药的法律不确定性", "此案为 UPC 管辖下的复杂跨国专利诉讼提供重要参考"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国药企出海应警惕高价值靶点专利雷区，提前开展 FTO 分析。在 UPC 新机制下，单一诉讼可能波及多国，建议企业建立欧洲专利风险预警机制，并评估通过许可或和解快速解决争议的商业价值。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["高价值生物药出海需前置 FTO 分析以规避侵权风险", "利用 UPC 机制特点，灵活制定诉讼或和解应对策略"]

items.title: Huawei launches another major battle over streaming against Disney
items.title_zh: 华为在统一专利法院对迪士尼发起流媒体专利新诉讼
items.summary: Since the launch of the UPC, Huawei has increasingly changed its role from defendant to claimant in major patent disputes. With several new lawsuits against Disney over HEVC technology, the Chinese tech group once again shows its determination to defend its own patents in Europe. Huawei filed a lawsuit against twelve companies of the Walt […] The post Huawei launches another major battle over streaming against Disney appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.content: Since the launch of the UPC, Huawei has increasingly changed its role from defendant to claimant in major patent disputes. With several new lawsuits against Disney over HEVC technology, the Chinese tech group once again shows its determination to defend its own patents in Europe. Huawei filed a lawsuit against twelve companies of the Walt […] The post Huawei launches another major battle over streaming against Disney appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 自统一专利法院（UPC）成立以来，华为角色从被告转向原告。近期，华为就 HEVC 技术向迪士尼旗下十二家公司提起多项新诉讼。此举彰显中国科技巨头利用 UPC 机制在欧洲积极维权、捍卫自身专利组合的战略决心，标志着其在欧知识产权策略的重大转变。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["华为利用 UPC 机制转变角色，从被动应诉转为主动发起专利诉讼", "案件聚焦 HEVC 流媒体技术，被告涵盖迪士尼旗下十二家关联公司", "此案体现中国企业依托欧洲统一司法体系强化海外专利保护的意图"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应善用 UPC 统一管辖优势，变被动为主动。建议提前布局高价值专利，建立常态化监控与诉讼应对机制，将知识产权转化为欧洲市场的核心竞争壁垒与谈判筹码。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["善用 UPC 统一裁判机制，降低多国诉讼成本，提升维权效率", "从防御转向进攻，通过主动诉讼确立行业地位并获取许可收益"]

items.title: UPC Court of Appeal overturns long-arm jurisdiction in suit against OpenAI and Adobe
items.title_zh: UPC 上诉法院推翻针对 OpenAI 等企业的长臂管辖权
items.summary: Appellate judges narrow the circumstances in which the Unified Patent Court has jurisdiction over alleged infringement beyond its member states
items.content: Appellate judges narrow the circumstances in which the Unified Patent Court has jurisdiction over alleged infringement beyond its member states
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在一项涉及 OpenAI 和 Adobe 的案件中作出重要裁决，推翻了初审法院关于“长臂管辖权”的认定。上诉法官明确缩小了 UPC 对成员国以外涉嫌侵权行为的管辖范围，确立了更严格的管辖连接点标准。该判决限制了专利权人利用 UPC 跨境追责非成员国实体的能力，是 UPC  jurisprudence 发展的里程碑事件。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 上诉法院推翻初审长臂管辖裁定，限制跨境执法范围", "明确管辖权需基于更紧密的成员国境内侵权行为连接点", "此裁决为涉及非欧盟实体（如美国公司）的专利诉讼确立新门槛"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临专利诉讼风险降低，尤其是仅通过数字服务涉足欧洲的情况。建议重新评估 UPC 诉讼策略，利用此判例抗辩管辖权；同时注意若在欧洲境内有实质运营，仍可能受管辖。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用新判据抗辩：若无欧洲实体运营，可主张 UPC 无管辖权", "警惕实质联系：在欧洲设立分支机构仍可能触发当地司法管辖"]
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal overturns long-arm jurisdiction in suit against OpenAI and Adobe
core_points_zh: UPC 上诉法院推翻初审长臂管辖裁定，限制跨境执法范围
明确管辖权需基于更紧密的成员国境内侵权行为连接点
此裁决为涉及非欧盟实体（如美国公司）的专利诉讼确立新门槛
insight_points_zh: 利用新判据抗辩：若无欧洲实体运营，可主张 UPC 无管辖权
警惕实质联系：在欧洲设立分支机构仍可能触发当地司法管辖

items.title: European SEP developments spur calls to add UK, Germany and UPC to US patent watch list
items.title_zh: 欧洲 SEP 动态引发将英德及 UPC 列入美国专利观察名单呼声
items.summary: As standard essential patent policy debates escalate, some stakeholders advocate for adding European jurisdictions on the USTR watch list
items.content: As standard essential patent policy debates escalate, some stakeholders advocate for adding European jurisdictions on the USTR watch list
items.ai_summary_zh: 随着标准必要专利（SEP）政策辩论升级，部分利益相关方呼吁美国贸易代表办公室（USTR）将英国、德国及统一专利法院（UPC）列入特别 301 报告观察名单。此举旨在施压欧洲司法辖区调整 FRAND 许可规则，反映跨大西洋在 SEP 执法与定价机制上的深层分歧，可能重塑全球专利许可格局。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["利益方呼吁 USTR 将英、德及 UPC 纳入专利观察名单", "争议焦点在于欧洲 SEP 禁令救济与 FRAND 费率裁定机制", "此举标志欧美在标准必要专利政策协调上出现显著裂痕"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临更复杂的地缘政治化专利环境。需警惕美欧规则冲突导致的合规风险，建议提前评估英德诉讼策略，建立多元化 FRAND 抗辩预案，避免成为大国博弈牺牲品。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注美欧政策分歧对在英德诉讼策略的潜在冲击", "构建应对地缘政治化专利纠纷的多元化合规预案"]
items.title_en: European SEP developments spur calls to add UK, Germany and UPC to US patent watch list

items.title: Samsung and ZTE deliver final UK FRAND arguments as Chongqing decision looms
items.title_zh: 三星与中兴提交英国 FRAND 终辩，重庆判决在即
items.summary: The relative timings of English and Chinese rate-setting judgments could play an important role in how dispute is resolved, while UPC and German hearings are also pending
items.content: The relative timings of English and Chinese rate-setting judgments could play an important role in how dispute is resolved, while UPC and German hearings are also pending
items.ai_summary_zh: 三星与中兴已在英国法院完成 FRAND 费率最终辩论，案件走向将受中英两国费率判决时序影响。与此同时，统一专利法院（UPC）及德国相关听证会亦 pending，多国司法程序交织可能重塑全球 SEP 许可格局。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英中两国费率判决时序将决定纠纷解决路径", "UPC 与德国听证会同步进行增加变量", "三星与中兴已完成英国阶段最终口头辩论"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临多法域诉讼风险，需统筹中英德及 UPC 策略。建议密切跟踪重庆判决对全球费率锚定效应，提前布局跨国应诉与许可谈判方案。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注中英判决时序对全球许可定价影响", "统筹 UPC 与成员国诉讼以优化应对策略"]

items.title: BREAKING: Ericsson sues Verifone at UPC in first IoT SEP enforcement actions
items.title_zh: 爱立信在 UPC 起诉 Verifone 发起首例物联网 SEP 执法
items.summary: SEP owner has asked Mannheim Local Division to determine whether its offer is FRAND
items.content: SEP owner has asked Mannheim Local Division to determine whether its offer is FRAND
items.ai_summary_zh: 标准必要专利持有人爱立信已向统一专利法院（UPC）曼海姆地方分院提起诉讼，指控 Verifone 侵权。此案标志着 UPC 受理的首批物联网领域 SEP 执法行动。爱立信请求法院裁定其提供的许可要约是否符合公平、合理和非歧视（FRAND）原则，旨在通过新司法机制确立 IoT 领域的许可费率基准。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["爱立信在 UPC 曼海姆分院发起首例物联网 SEP 诉讼", "核心诉求为请求法院裁定其许可要约符合 FRAND 原则", "该案将测试 UPC 在处理复杂物联网专利纠纷中的效能"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国物联网及支付终端企业应警惕 UPC 成为 SEP 权利人新战场。建议提前评估产品专利风险，制定符合 FRAND 原则的谈判策略，避免因应对不当面临全欧禁令风险。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC 单一诉讼即可覆盖多国，中国企业需升级泛欧风控体系", "主动构建 FRAND 合规证据链，以应对潜在的费率裁定诉讼"]
items.title_en: BREAKING: Ericsson sues Verifone at UPC in first IoT SEP enforcement actions
core_points_zh: 爱立信在 UPC 曼海姆分院发起首例物联网 SEP 诉讼
核心诉求为请求法院裁定其许可要约符合 FRAND 原则
该案将测试 UPC 在处理复杂物联网专利纠纷中的效能

items.title: Amazon-InterDigital dispute and landmark CJEU referral put UPC jurisdiction in focus
items.title_zh: 亚马逊与 InterDigital 纠纷及 CJEU 转呈聚焦 UPC 管辖权
items.summary: A recent UK court ruling calls for clearer cross-court communication while the UPC asks Europe’s top court for clarity on the use of long-arm jurisdiction
items.content: A recent UK court ruling calls for clearer cross-court communication while the UPC asks Europe’s top court for clarity on the use of long-arm jurisdiction
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国法院近期裁定呼吁加强跨国司法沟通，与此同时，统一专利法院（UPC）就长臂管辖权的适用问题向欧盟法院（CJEU）寻求澄清。该动态源于亚马逊与 InterDigital 的标准必要专利争端，标志着 UPC 管辖范围面临关键法律测试，可能重塑欧洲 SEP 诉讼格局。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国法院裁定强调跨法域司法协作的必要性", "UPC 就长臂管辖权向 CJEU 提起里程碑式初步裁决", "亚马逊与 InterDigital 纠纷成为检验 UPC 权限的关键案例"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧涉足 SEP 许可或诉讼时，需高度关注 UPC 管辖权边界变化。建议提前评估长臂管辖风险，优化全球诉讼策略，并利用英欧司法互动窗口期加强合规布局。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["密切关注 CJEU 对 UPC 长臂管辖权的最终界定", "调整欧洲 SEP 诉讼策略以应对跨法域管辖不确定性"]
items.title_en: Amazon-InterDigital dispute and landmark CJEU referral put UPC jurisdiction in focus
core_points_zh: 英国法院裁定强调跨法域司法协作的必要性
UPC 就长臂管辖权向 CJEU 提起里程碑式初步裁决
亚马逊与 InterDigital 纠纷成为检验 UPC 权限的关键案例
insight_points_zh: 密切关注 CJEU 对 UPC 长臂管辖权的最终界定

brief.headline_zh: 欧 SEP 诉讼收紧：德严英争与 UPC 崛起
brief.headline_en: Europe SEP Crackdown: Germany Strict, UK Disputes, UPC Rise
brief.summary_zh: 欧洲 SEP 执法环境剧变，德国法院重构 FRAND 规则并强化禁令执行，英国管辖权争议加剧，UPC 成为新战场。欧盟监管改革与地缘博弈叠加，中企面临高额罚金与全球费率裁决风险，亟需升级合规谈判与多法域应诉策略。
key_points: 德国法院重塑 FRAND 判定标准，严格审查被许可人意愿，禁令风险显著上升。
英国与 UPC 管辖权博弈激烈，全球费率裁决与地域禁令冲突成为诉讼焦点。
欧盟推进 SEP 监管改革，强制调解与数据披露新规将改变许可谈判路径。
actions: 构建多维度“许可意愿”证据链，主动提供担保以规避德国法院禁令风险。
建立英、德、UPC 多法域协同应对机制，利用管辖权异议争取谈判空间。
清洗内部专利数据并建立可比许可数据库，以精准数据支撑 FRAND 抗辩。
watchlist: 德国宪法法院对 VoiceAge 诉 HMD 案违宪申诉的最终裁定及其连锁反应。
欧盟 SEP 监管改革提案落地进度及强制调解程序的具体实施规则。
UPC 巴黎分院在 Sun 诉 Vivo 案中确立的在线销售管辖权扩张趋势。

sep_ai_analysis.summary_zh: SEP 长窗从 2025.01 累计到现在，共识别 120 条高相关信号。近120天里，许可动作占比最高，欧洲层面仍是最活跃场域。
sep_ai_analysis.summary_en: The SEP long window now spans from Jan 2025 to the present with 120 high-relevance signals. In the recent 120-day window, Licensing lead the mix and Europe-wide remains the busiest forum.

insight_cards.insight_zh: 许可动作已经从背景变量变成当前主线，说明专利池扩围、费率博弈和双边谈判正在持续抬高经营准备门槛。
insight_cards.insight_en: Licensing has moved from a background factor to the main storyline, showing pools, rate-setting, and bilateral talks are raising the preparation bar.
insight_cards.action_zh: 优先把许可覆盖、费率对标和 willing licensee 证据准备前置。
insight_cards.action_en: Front-load licence coverage checks, rate benchmarking, and willing-licensee evidence.
insight_cards.evidence_zh: 近120天 许可动作 24 / 前120天 22 / 长窗累计 86

insight_cards.insight_zh: 欧洲层面是近120天最活跃的场域，德国紧随其后，争议正在形成多法域联动。
insight_cards.insight_en: Europe-wide is the busiest forum in the recent window, with Germany close behind, pointing to multi-forum spillover.
insight_cards.action_zh: 优先盯住 欧洲层面 的裁判与程序变化，并同步观察外溢到其他法域的连锁影响。
insight_cards.action_en: Track procedural and decisional shifts in Europe-wide first, then watch for spillover into other venues.
insight_cards.evidence_zh: 欧洲层面 17 条；德国 6 条

insight_cards.insight_zh: 近120天中企相关信号共有 9 条，占近期样本 26%。重点企业包括 Oppo / Honor / Huawei。
insight_cards.insight_en: There are 9 China-related signals in the recent 120-day window, or 26% of the sample. Focus companies include Oppo / Honor / Huawei.
insight_cards.action_zh: 把许可准备、诉讼预案和客户交付协同放到同一张经营清单里，不要只按单案应对。
insight_cards.action_en: Put licensing readiness, litigation planning, and customer-delivery coordination on the same operating checklist rather than treating them as one-off disputes.

insight_cards.insight_zh: 当前约 100% 的专题样本基于全文或公开预览分析，摘要级样本主要用于补趋势，不宜单独放大解读。
insight_cards.insight_en: About 100% of the topic rests on full-text or public-preview analysis; summary-only items are mainly useful for directional trend support.
insight_cards.action_zh: 对涉及重大经营判断的节点，优先回到原文或公开预览核实，再决定是否升级为重点预警。
insight_cards.action_en: For business-critical signals, step back to the source text or public preview before escalating them into priority warnings.
insight_cards.evidence_zh: 全文 27 / 预览 93 / 摘要 0

trend_judgments: 近120天 SEP标准必要专利信号较前120天增加 7 条，整体仍在升温。
当前最强主线仍是许可动作，近120天共 24 条，说明专利池、费率与双边谈判继续主导节奏。
欧洲层面是近120天最活跃的主导法域/场域，共出现 17 条相关信号。
中企相关信号近120天共有 9 条，占近期样本 26%；当前专题中约 100% 的样本基于全文或公开预览分析。
trend_judgments_en: SEP signals are up by 7 over the prior 120 days, pointing to a still-heating window.
Licensing remains the strongest line with 24 recent signals, keeping pools, rates, and bilateral talks at the center.
Europe-wide is the most active forum in the recent 120-day window with 17 signals.
China-related signals account for 9 items, or 26% of the recent window; about 100% of the topic rests on full-text or public-preview analysis.

brief.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

VoiceAge vs HMD saga continues with constitutional complaint
items.title_zh: HMD 就 VoiceAge 案向德国宪法法院提起违宪申诉
items.summary: HMD Global has filed a constitutional complaint with the German Federal Constitutional Court in the ongoing SEP dispute with VoiceAgeEVS.
items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles BDPE Patent- und Rechtsanwälte WALLINGER RICKER SCHLOTTER TOSTMANN Boult Wade Tennant View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Felix Hermann Valentin Wagner K. Victoria Barker, Ph.D. View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

WALLINGER RICKER SCHLOTTER TOSTMANN

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Finnish smartphone manufacturer HMD Global has filed a constitutional complaint with the German Federal Constitutional Court in the ongoing SEP dispute with VoiceAgeEVS. The company argues that the Federal Court of Justice's refusal to refer key FRAND questions to the European Court of Justice violates its constitutional right to the lawful judge. However, the bar for bringing such cases before the German Constitutional Court is high.

HMD filed the constitutional complaint on 12 March, roughly six weeks after the Federal Court of Justice dismissed its appeal on 27 January. The complaint targets the Federal Court’s decision not to refer questions on the interpretation of EU law regarding SEP holders’ FRAND licensing obligations to the CJEU — despite an amicus curiae intervention by the European Commission urging such a referral.

According to HMD , the Federal Court of Justice’s refusal to refer these questions to the CJEU denies judicial clarification by the court competent to interpret EU law, thereby violating HMD’s constitutional right to the lawful judge.

The constitutional complaint is not wholly unexpected. In a statement issued shortly after the Federal Court of Justice ruling in late January, HMD had already signalled it would evaluate further legal steps. At the time, JUVE Patent reported that a constitutional complaint was likely the Finnish company’s only remaining option under German law.

The Federal Court of Justice upheld Munich Higher Regional Court’s injunction against HMD in the VoiceAgeEVS dispute, largely maintaining its FRAND case law from the landmark Sisvel v Haier I and II decisions. At the oral hearing on 27 January, presiding judge Sabine Rotloff made clear early on that HMD’s appeal had little chance of success.
items.ai_summary_zh: 芬兰 HMD Global 因与 VoiceAgeEVS 的标准必要专利纠纷，向德国联邦宪法法院提起申诉。HMD 指控德国联邦最高法院拒绝将 FRAND 许可义务的关键欧盟法问题移交欧盟法院审理，侵犯了其获得法定法官审判的宪法权利。尽管欧盟委员会曾建议移交，但德国法院维持了禁令判决，此案标志着该长期诉讼进入新的宪法审查阶段。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["HMD 申诉称德国最高法拒移审欧盟法问题违宪", "案件核心争议在于 SEP 持有人的 FRAND 许可义务", "德国宪法法院受理门槛高，此前上诉已被驳回"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧遭遇 SEP 禁令时，若遇德国法院拒绝移审欧盟法院，可评估宪法申诉路径。需密切关注德国司法对欧盟法解释权的边界，提前布局 FRAND 抗辩证据，防范因程序僵局导致的禁售风险。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注德国法院拒绝移审欧盟法院时的宪法救济可能", "强化 FRAND 谈判记录以应对潜在禁令与违宪争议"]

items.title: FRAND licence disputes did not lead to more cases at UK patent courts
items.title_zh: FRAND 许可纠纷未致英国专利法院案件激增
items.summary: UK figures show London's reputation for FRAND has not led to the anticipated surge in case numbers at UK patent courts.
items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles Taylor Wessing KATHER AUGENSTEIN Grünecker View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Harm van der Heijden Grégoire Desrousseaux Dr. Markus Engelhard View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

The number of cases at the UK High Court fell slightly in 2024, while the IPEC saw a modest increase in IP cases compared to the previous year. However, London's reputation for FRAND-rate determinations has not yet delivered the surge in case numbers that many UK lawyers had anticipated.

The UK High Court and Court of Appeal have established themselves globally as the go-to courts for determining FRAND rates between SEP holders and implementers. Many UK lawyers had hoped this would attract more cases and business to London firms. However, according to the UK civil justice statistics , this did not materialise in 2024.

The UK High Court recorded slightly fewer cases than in 2023, dropping from 46 to 44 new patent cases. The court reached its peak in 2016 and 2017, with 71 and 85 new cases respectively. Numbers then fell to 40 and have since hovered around 50 new cases per year. After falling to 35 in 2022, cases recovered by 31% to 46 in 2023.

Many UK lawyers saw this as evidence that the UK’s position outside the UPC was benefiting its patent courts. They had hoped this trend would continue. However, these hopes were dashed, particularly in the final two quarters of 2024 when new cases notably declined. The High Court, with permanent judges Richard Meade and James Mellor, recorded only nine new cases in each of these quarters, compared to ten and 16 in the first two quarters.

Like the High Court, the Intellectual Property Enterprise Court saw its highest number of cases in 2017, with 242 new IP cases. The IPEC, a specialist subdivision within the Business and Property Courts of the UK High Court, has since consistently recorded fewer than 200 cases annually.

Over the past twelve months, new IP cases totalled 141, up 6.9% from 132 in 2023. This marks the second consecutive year of growth. While the UK statistics do not specify how many IPEC cases relate to patents, experts believe technical property rights make up the majority.
items.ai_summary_zh: 尽管伦敦确立了全球 FRAND 费率裁决中心地位，但 2024 年英国高等法院新专利案量微降至 44 件，未现预期增长。虽知识产权企业法院（IPEC）案件小幅回升，但受统一专利法院（UPC）分流及季度波动影响，英国脱离 UPC 后的案件红利在 2024 年末显著消退，显示市场格局趋于稳定。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年英国高等法院新专利案件略降，未因 FRAND 声誉出现激增", "知识产权企业法院案件连续两年增长，但总量仍低于历史峰值", "律师界期望的脱欧后案件红利在 2024 年下半年未能持续兑现"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应理性看待英国法院在 SEP 领域的角色，避免盲目扎堆诉讼。需结合 UPC 进展评估管辖策略，利用 IPEC 处理中小额争议，同时在英欧两地布局以应对潜在的平行诉讼风险。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["勿高估英国法院案件增量，需统筹规划英欧双轨诉讼策略", "关注 IPEC 成本优势，将其作为中小企业维权或抗辩优选地"]

items.title: Munich Higher Regional Court confirms new FRAND guidelines in VoiceAge vs HMD
items.title_zh: 慕尼黑高院确认 VoiceAge 诉 HMD 案 FRAND 新指南
items.summary: Higher Regional Court rules HMD is unwilling licensee infringing VoiceAge EVS speech-coding patent and cannot sell products in Germany.
items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles df-mp Patentanwälte Rechtsanwälte PartG mbB DHS HEUKING View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Daniel F. Seitz Dr. Tobias Hahn Denis Monégier du Sorbier View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

df-mp Patentanwälte Rechtsanwälte PartG mbB

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

HMD continues to infringe a patent belonging to VoiceAge's speech-coding standard EVS and cannot distribute corresponding products in Germany. The Higher Regional Court Munich has classified HMD as an unwilling licensee in its ruling. The judges simultaneously confirmed an injunction against Oppo.

The Higher Regional Court Munich under presiding judge Lars Meinhardt has rejected HMD’s appeal against a ruling by the Regional Court Munich. The court found that HMD infringes the EVS speech-coding patent EP 2 102 619 owned by VoiceAge and is not a willing licensee (case ID: 6 U 3824/22 Kart).

Originally, the court had planned to publish its highly anticipated ruling on 6 February. However, due to the scope of the decision, the court needed six additional weeks.

Given the fundamental importance of today’s decision, the Higher Regional Court Munich has granted HMD leave to appeal to the German Federal Court of Justice. The dispute between VoiceAge and HMD has gained considerable significance for SEP and FRAND law in Germany.

In 2019, VoiceAge sued HMD over five patents in Mannheim and Munich. EP 1 509 903 , EP 2 162 880 , EP 2 707 687, EP 3 132 443 and EP 2 102 619 cover the speech-coding standard EVS.
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国慕尼黑高等法院驳回 HMD 上诉，裁定其侵犯 VoiceAge 的 EVS 语音编码专利且属非自愿被许可人，维持禁售令。法院同时确认针对 Oppo 的禁令，并批准 HMD 向联邦最高法院上诉。此案确立了德国 SEP 与 FRAND 许可谈判的新司法标准，具有里程碑意义。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院认定 HMD 为非自愿被许可人，维持产品禁售令", "确认针对 Oppo 的禁令，强化标准必要专利执行力", "批准上诉至联邦最高法院，凸显案件法律指导价值"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国手机及通信企业需重新评估在德 FRAND 谈判策略，避免因被认定为“非自愿”而遭禁售。建议提前准备符合德国最新司法标准的许可要约，并关注联邦最高法院最终裁决风向。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕被德法院认定为非自愿被许可人的高风险", "依据新指南优化许可谈判流程以规避禁售风险"]

items.title: No stay for Huawei in UK FRAND trial against MediaTek
items.title_zh: 英国高院驳回华为中止联发科 FRAND 诉讼及上诉许可申请
items.summary: The UK High Court dismisses Huawei's second bid to stay FRAND rate-setting case against MediaTek and denies leave to appeal.
items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles GOTTSCHALD Grünecker Meissner Bolte Patentanwälte Rechtsanwälte Partnerschaft mbB View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Dr. Lukas Bischoff Prof. Willem Hoyng Matthew Royle, Ph.D. View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

Meissner Bolte Patentanwälte Rechtsanwälte Partnerschaft mbB

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

The global SEP dispute between Huawei and MediaTek looks set to proceed in the UK, as the Chinese mobile phone manufacturer has once again failed in its bid to suspend the FRAND case at the High Court.

The UK High Court’s refusal to suspend the case means the FRAND rate-setting proceedings for Huawei’s 5G portfolio can now continue unimpeded. High Court judge Thomas Leech also denied Huawei permission to appeal his decision (case ID: HP-2024-000028 ). However, Huawei may still petition the Court of Appeal directly for leave to appeal.

In a global SEPS dispute between the two parties, spanning China, Germany and the UPC, MediaTek sought a global FRAND-rate determination for Huawei’s patent portfolio from the UK High Court. Huawei contested the court’s jurisdiction to set a global FRAND rate, and alternatively applied for a stay on case-management grounds.

In March, judge Leech rejected this challenge, affirming the court’s competence to rule on MediaTek’s request and dismissing the stay application.

On 10 April 2025, Huawei filed a further application seeking a second case-management stay, supported by four new witness statements and a skeleton argument. Last Friday, judge Leech again declined to stay the case.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国高等法院再次驳回华为请求中止与联发科全球费率裁决案的决定，并拒绝授予上诉许可。法官 Thomas Leech 确认法院有权裁定全球 FRAND 费率，认为华为提出的案件管理理由不足以暂停程序。尽管无法直接上诉，华为仍可向上诉法院直接申请许可。此案是双方在全球多地（含中国、德国、UPC）平行诉讼的关键一环，英国程序将继续推进。

items.title: Munich Regional Court reinterprets FRAND rules in Samsung vs ZTE
items.title_zh: 慕尼黑地方法院在三星诉中兴案中重构 FRAND 规则
items.summary: In ZTE vs Samsung, the 7th Civil Chamber of Munich Regional Court has set out new approaches to FRAND proceedings.
items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles Grünecker TALIENS DHS View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Marta Mendes Dr. Nadine Losleben Dr. Dirk Bröcher, LL.M. View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

In the pan-European dispute between ZTE and Samsung, the 7th Civil Chamber of Munich Regional Court has set out new approaches to FRAND proceedings. These deviate from the Higher Regional Court's position on one key point. Furthermore, the Regional Court found that the interim licence recently granted by the UK High Court is not decisive.

In a legal note following a “FRAND first” hearing, the Munich Regional Court’s 7th Civil Chamber laid out its approach to several questions not yet fully clarified by case law. The focus was on the significance of security deposits from patent users and the relevance of interim licences.

According to a spokesperson for Munich Regional Court, it remains unclear to what extent other chambers, particularly the 21st Civil Chamber which also handles patent law, will agree with the 7th Chamber’s assessments.

In November last year, Munich Higher Regional Court took the stance in HMD vs VoiceAge that “continuing willingness to take a licence” is met only if an implementer provides reasonable security, for example through a bank guarantee.

The Regional Court expressed doubts whether these principles would stand up in appeal proceedings at the Federal Court of Justice. The 7th Chamber takes a different view on what constitutes willingness.

According to the note, a licensee demonstrates willingness by quickly providing quantity information, having substantial own licensing relating to standards, being prepared to pay undisputed sums after sufficient negotiations, offering arbitration and providing security.
items.ai_summary_zh: 慕尼黑地方法院第七民事庭在三星与中兴的泛欧纠纷中，提出了 FRAND 诉讼的新方法。法院质疑高等法院关于“提供担保即代表许可意愿”的观点，认为被许可人通过快速提供数量信息、参与仲裁及支付无争议款项等行为亦可证明意愿。此外，法院明确指出英国高等法院近期授予的临时许可不具有决定性效力，该判决可能引发联邦最高法院层面的进一步上诉。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院重新定义“许可意愿”，不再单一依赖银行担保作为判定标准", "明确裁定英国法院授予的临时许可在德国 FRAND 程序中非决定性因素", "第七民事庭观点可能与本院其他庭及上级法院存在分歧，上诉风险高"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在德应诉 SEP 案件时，应多元化举证“许可意愿”，避免仅依赖资金担保。需警惕英国临时许可在德效力受限，制定国别化诉讼策略，并预判案件可能上诉至联邦最高法院的时间成本。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["构建多维度的许可意愿证据链，降低因未提供担保而被判侵权的风险", "摒弃跨国许可互认幻想，针对德国司法实践独立准备抗辩与谈判方案"]

items.title: SEP holders force UPC into FRAND dance with UK courts
items.title_zh: SEP 持有人迫使 UPC 介入 FRAND 费率裁决引发英法德法院竞争
items.summary: Sun Patent has asked the UPC's Paris local division for a FRAND-rate determination in its dispute with Vivo.
items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles COHAUSZ & FLORACK GOTTSCHALD Kirkland & Ellis View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Dr. Andreas Ledl Erich Fritsche Dr. Detlef Raasch View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Sun Patent Trust has asked the UPC's Paris local division to set a FRAND rate in its dispute with Vivo. Ericsson has also filed a similar FRAND claim in its battle with Transsion. A FRAND-rate determination by the UPC could intensify competition with the UK High Court and Munich Regional Court.

Rumours have circulated among experts for some time. Since last Friday, it has become clear that the Unified Patent Court has received a complaint from an SEP holder regarding FRAND-rate determination.

At the end of November, the Court of Appeal rejected an application by implementer Vivo to halt the main proceedings in its dispute with Sun Patent Trust until the Court of Appeal decides whether the UPC has jurisdiction to make FRAND-rate determinations.

Sun Patent first applied to the UPC for a FRAND-rate determination in April. This forms part of two infringement actions brought by the Panasonic-affiliated licensing company against two SEPs at the Paris local division (case IDs: UPC_CFI_361/2025 and UPC_CFI_362/2025). Sun Patent aims to stop the sale of various 4G+ compatible Vivo devices.

The FRAND applications embedded in the SEP holder’s lawsuits only came to light through recent UPC procedural orders addressing the court’s jurisdiction over such applications. The court also had to determine whether to stay the main proceedings pending a decision on its fundamental jurisdiction.

Vivo now has clarity: the main proceedings will continue as normal. The first panel of the UPC Court of Appeal under presiding judge Klaus Grabinski made this decision (case ID: UPC_CFI_361/2025 ). Consequently, Vivo had to submit its defence statement by Friday.
items.ai_summary_zh: Sun Patent Trust 向统一专利法院（UPC）巴黎分部申请确定 FRAND 许可费率，遭实施者 Vivo 质疑管辖权。UPC 上诉法院驳回 Vivo 中止审理请求，确认主程序继续。此举标志 UPC 正式介入全球费率裁决竞争，可能与英国高等法院及慕尼黑地方法院形成管辖权博弈，重塑标准必要专利诉讼策略。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 上诉法院驳回 Vivo 中止申请，确认其对 FRAND 费率拥有管辖权", "Sun Patent 在巴黎分部提起侵权诉讼并嵌入费率确定请求，案号明确", "UPC 介入费率裁决将加剧与英国、德国法院在全球 SEP 诉讼中的竞争"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临多重司法管辖风险，需重新评估应诉策略。建议密切关注 UPC 判例走向，提前布局英、德、法多地防御体系，避免单一法院不利裁决导致全球许可被动，同时利用管辖权异议争取谈判筹码。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕 UPC 成为 SEP 持有人新战场，需建立多法域协同应对机制", "利用管辖权争议延缓程序，为跨境许可谈判争取时间与空间"]
