news_items.title: How the UK’s interim FRAND licence experiment lost its way
news_items.title_zh: 英国临时 FRAND 许可实验为何迷失方向
news_items.summary: Saturday Opinion: It equates injunction requests with bad faith, imposes licences without consent and relies on inconsistent frameworks, but there is a way to course-correct
news_items.content: Saturday Opinion: It equates injunction requests with bad faith, imposes licences without consent and relies on inconsistent frameworks, but there is a way to course-correct
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 本文评论指出，英国法院在标准必要专利（SEP）案件中推行的临时 FRAND 许可机制存在严重偏差。该机制错误地将禁令请求等同于恶意行为，并在缺乏双方合意的情况下强制施加许可条款，且依赖不一致的法律框架。文章认为当前路径不可持续，但提出了修正方向，旨在恢复许可谈判的平衡与公正。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在英涉及 SEP 纠纷时，需警惕当地法院可能强制裁定临时许可的风险。建议提前储备全球费率证据，避免被动接受不利条款，并关注后续判例是否回调。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["将申请禁令直接视为恶意行为的做法缺乏法律依据且显失公平", "未经当事人同意强制设定许可条款违背了契约自由的基本原则", "现行临时许可框架内部逻辑矛盾，亟需司法实践进行纠偏修正"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["需防范英国法院在未达成共识前强制裁定临时许可费率的司法风险", "应完善全球费率举证策略，以应对潜在的强制性许可条款裁决"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 聚焦英国 SEP 临时许可实验，直接关联欧洲核心法域 FRAND 规则演进。
news_items.title_en: How the UK’s interim FRAND licence experiment lost its way

未经当事人同意强制设定许可条款违背了契约自由的基本原则

news_items.title: European Parliament backs suit against Commission over SEP regulation shelving
news_items.title_zh: 欧议会支持就搁置 SEP 法规起诉欧盟委员会
news_items.summary: CJEU suit could stimulate new FRAND regulatory efforts
news_items.content: CJEU suit could stimulate new FRAND regulatory efforts
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲议会决定支持向欧盟法院提起诉讼，指控欧盟委员会不当搁置标准必要专利（SEP）监管提案。此举旨在打破立法僵局，迫使委员会重新审视或推进 FRAND 许可规则的制定。诉讼结果可能成为催化剂，刺激欧盟在 SEP 领域出台新的强制性监管措施，重塑许可生态。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国 SEP 持有者及出口企业需警惕欧盟监管风向突变。若诉讼成功，强制许可规则可能趋严。建议企业提前评估现有许可协议合规性，关注 FRAND 费率计算新方法，并积极参与欧盟后续立法咨询以维护利益。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧洲议会正式支持起诉委员会，反对其搁置 SEP 监管提案的行为", "拟向欧盟法院（CJEU）提起诉讼，试图通过司法途径打破政策僵局", "诉讼预期将施压欧盟重启 FRAND 规则制定，推动新监管框架落地"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["诉讼若胜诉将加速欧盟 SEP 强监管落地，增加许可合规成本", "中企应密切跟踪案件进展，预判 FRAND 规则变化对业务的影响"]

news_items.title: Xiaomi is Access Advance’s latest licensor-licensee
news_items.title_zh: 小米加入 Access Advance 兼具许可人与被许可人双重身份
news_items.summary: The Chinese smartphone maker’s decision to join VVC Advance is intriguing because its dual licensor-licensee role hints at a monetisation mindset
news_items.content: The Chinese smartphone maker’s decision to join VVC Advance is intriguing because its dual licensor-licensee role hints at a monetisation mindset
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 中国智能手机制造商小米决定加入 VVC Advance 专利池，其独特之处在于同时扮演许可人与被许可人的双重角色。这一举动不仅表明小米在视频编码标准必要专利领域的深度参与，更暗示其战略思维已从单纯的成本控制转向积极的专利货币化，试图在全球 SEP 生态中通过双向角色平衡风险并获取收益。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应借鉴小米策略，从被动应诉转向主动构建 SEP 组合。建议加大核心标准技术投入，争取进入国际专利池成为许可人，利用双重身份在 FRAND 原则下优化许可成本，提升在欧洲市场的议价能力与合规安全性。

news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["推动从单一被许可人向双重角色转型以优化成本", "利用 SEP 组合增强在欧洲市场的谈判与防御筹码"]

news_items.content: SEP strategists can expect much needed guidance on tricky FRAND questions
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 英国最高法院决定受理苹果公司针对标准必要专利（SEP）FRAND 费率的上诉案件，并同时收到交互数字公司提出的交叉上诉申请。此案备受业界关注，预计法院将对复杂的 FRAND 许可原则提供关键性司法指引，明确全球费率裁定权限及反垄断边界，从而重塑欧洲乃至全球的 SEP 诉讼策略与许可谈判格局。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临 SEP 诉讼风险加剧，需密切关注英国法院对全球费率管辖权的界定。建议提前布局高价值专利组合，优化许可谈判策略，并评估在英国诉讼的潜在成本与合规风险，以应对可能的不利裁决。

news_items.title: InterDigital accelerate battle against Amazon in Europe, Brazil and the US
news_items.title_zh: InterDigital 在欧美巴多地起诉亚马逊专利侵权
news_items.summary: InterDigital has filed its first infringement suits against Amazon in Brazil, the USA, Germany and at the UPC.
news_items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles Appleyard Lees PENTARC Rechtsanwälte PartG mbB GOTTSCHALD View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Pete Damerell Penny Gilbert Bryce Matthewson View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

InterDigital and Amazon have primarily battled in court over anti-interim-licence injunctions and anti-suit injunctions until now. Now, the SEP holder has filed its first infringement suits against the internet giant in Brazil, the USA, Germany and at the UPC. Next Friday, however, the opponents will meet again in Mannheim as the local division reviews an ex parte anti-interim-licence injunction.

InterDigital announced yesterday that it has initiated litigation against Amazon over alleged ongoing infringement of its intellectual property. The company filed cases with the US Federal District Court in Delaware, the Rio de Janeiro State Court, the Munich Regional Court and the UPC local division of Mannheim.

In total, InterDigital asserted the infringement of ten patents, including EP 2 548 372 and EP 3 240 285 at the Mannheim local division. At the Munich Regional Court, the NPE sued for infringement of EP 2 875 487. All patents-in-suit relate to video content compression and picture quality improvement through high dynamic range (HDR) technology. InterDigital claims Amazon infringes these through devices including FireTV and Kindle, and through services including Prime Video.

“Our preference is always to sign licenses through amicable negotiation,” said Josh Schmidt, Chief Legal Officer at InterDigital . “But Amazon’s decision to initiate litigation against InterDigital earlier this year shows that Amazon is more interested in litigating than negotiating.”

Both companies had long attempted to conclude a licence, but without success.

Initially, Amazon sought a declaration of non-infringement at the High Court, alleging that InterDigital had abused a dominant position. Amazon also sought declarations concerning InterDigital’s obligations under the ITU-T FRAND commitment (case ID: HP-2025-000043).
news_items.ai_summary_zh: InterDigital 正式在德国慕尼黑、曼海姆（UPC）、美国及巴西对亚马逊提起首批专利侵权诉讼，涉案十项关于视频压缩与 HDR 技术的标准必要专利。此前双方主要围绕禁令博弈，现升级为实体侵权争端。InterDigital 指责亚马逊拒绝善意谈判，案件将在 UPC 及德国地方法院同步推进。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应警惕 SEP 持有人利用 UPC 新机制发起多国联动诉讼。建议提前评估产品专利风险，建立 FRAND 谈判预案，避免陷入被动应诉局面，同时关注德国法院与 UPC 的裁判尺度差异。

news_items.title: InterDigital and Arnold Ruess win injunction against Disney
news_items.title_zh: InterDigital 获慕尼黑法院禁令禁止迪士尼在德国侵权
news_items.summary: Disney may not use InterDigital's advanced video compression technology on its streaming platforms in Germany.
news_items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles Powell Gilbert Appleyard Lees df-mp Patentanwälte Rechtsanwälte PartG mbB View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Michael Wallinger Julia Obradovic-Walz Markus Kreuzberg View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

df-mp Patentanwälte Rechtsanwälte PartG mbB

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Disney may not use InterDigital's advanced video compression technology on its streaming platforms in Germany. The Regional Court Munich has issued an injunction against the US entertainment company. Earlier this year, InterDigital sued the Walt Disney Company in the US, Brazil and Europe.

4 November 2025 by Konstanze Richter

According to a press release from InterDigital, the Munich Regional Court issued a decision on the merits, banning Disney from infringing EP 1 905 233 (case ID: 7 O 1297/25). InterDigital’s patent enables a method for dynamically overlaying a first video stream with a second video stream comprising, for example, subtitles. Disney can appeal the decision.

The Munich court’s judgment, follows a decision from a Brazilian court in parallel litigation to grant a preliminary injunction in InterDigital’s favour. The Brazilian court found that Disney infringed both of the InterDigital patents-in-suit.

InterDigital has also filed suits at the United States Federal District Court in the Central District of California (case ID: 2:2025cv00895 ) and the Unified Patent Court’s local divisions in Mannheim (case ID: UPC_CFI_445/2025 ) and Düsseldorf (case IDs: UPC_CFI_297/2025 and UPC_CFI_651/2025 ).
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 慕尼黑地区法院就 InterDigital 诉迪士尼案作出实体判决，禁止迪士尼在德国流媒体平台使用其视频压缩专利技术（EP 1 905 233）。此前巴西法院已颁发初步禁令。InterDigital 还在美国及 UPC 曼海姆、杜塞尔多夫分院提起平行诉讼，显示其全球维权策略。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧出口含视频技术产品需警惕 SEP 风险，关注 UPC 与成员国法院并行诉讼趋势。建议提前开展 FTO 分析，评估德国禁令对供应链影响，并制定跨国应诉预案。

news_items.title: The relationship between proportionality and FRAND defence in SEP infringement cases
news_items.title_zh: SEP 侵权案中比例原则与 FRAND 抗辩的关系解析
news_items.summary: Two European rulings underline that injunctions cannot be excluded by default without assessing the parties’ behaviour in each individual case
news_items.content: Two European rulings underline that injunctions cannot be excluded by default without assessing the parties’ behaviour in each individual case
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 两项欧洲最新裁决强调，在标准必要专利侵权案件中，不能默认排除禁令救济。法院必须在个案中深入评估双方当事人的具体行为，特别是实施者是否善意遵循 FRAND 原则，以此作为适用比例原则决定是否颁发禁令的关键依据。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应对 SEP 诉讼时，须高度重视谈判过程的合规性与善意证据留存。切勿误判“禁令难获”而消极应对，应主动展示 FRAND 许可意愿，避免因行为瑕疵导致禁令风险激增。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["禁令非自动排除：不能仅因涉及 SEP 就默认拒绝颁发禁令救济", "个案行为评估：必须详细审查双方在谈判及诉讼中的具体表现", "比例原则应用：基于当事人行为判定禁令是否符合比例原则"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["谈判需留痕：全程记录善意协商证据以防范禁令风险", "摒弃侥幸心理：欧洲法院将严格个案审查而非默认保护"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 涉及欧洲 SEP 侵权禁令与 FRAND 抗辩的核心司法裁判规则
news_items.title_en: The relationship between proportionality and FRAND defence in SEP infringement cases
core_points_zh: 禁令非自动排除：不能仅因涉及 SEP 就默认拒绝颁发禁令救济

news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国物联网企业应关注此类新型许可模式，评估潜在合规风险。建议提前梳理产品专利链条，主动参与或监测相关专利池动态，避免因碎片化市场中的许可盲区引发侵权纠纷，优化出海知识产权策略。

news_items.ai_summary_zh: 诺基亚针对宏碁、华硕及海信的审判上周开庭，核心焦点在于仲裁在标准必要专利（SEP）纠纷中的角色。该案不仅涉及侵权判定，更提出了关于（F）RAND 许可义务与仲裁机制结合的全新法律疑问，可能影响未来欧洲 SEP 争议解决路径。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临 SEP 诉讼时，需高度关注仲裁机制的新动向。建议提前评估专利组合风险，制定包含仲裁条款的许可策略，以应对潜在的禁令威胁及高昂诉讼成本。

news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国流媒体及终端企业应警惕诺基亚等欧洲权利人的许可扩张。建议提前开展 FTEC 分析，评估专利风险，积极通过谈判获取公平合理条款，避免潜在诉讼成本。

news_items.title: UKIPO says “no preferred options” as SEP consultation triggers transatlantic pushback
news_items.title_zh: 英知识产权局称无首选方案，SEP 咨询遭跨大西洋抵制
news_items.summary: Twenty-six US free-market organisations are urging Trump to intervene in policy discussions, claiming proposals are an “assault” on US patent value
news_items.content: Twenty-six US free-market organisations are urging Trump to intervene in policy discussions, claiming proposals are an “assault” on US patent value
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）就标准必要专利（SEP）框架进行咨询，明确表示目前“无首选方案”。此举引发 26 家美国自由市场组织强烈反对，他们致信特朗普总统，指控相关提案是对美国专利价值的“攻击”， urging 其介入干预。该事件凸显了英美在 SEP 许可政策上的潜在分歧及跨国利益冲突。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临更复杂的 SEP 许可环境，需警惕美欧政策博弈带来的不确定性。建议密切关注 UKIPO 最终政策走向，评估对 FRAND 原则执行的影响，提前布局应对潜在的许可费争议或诉讼策略调整。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO 在 SEP 咨询中保持中立，未提出首选监管方案", "家美国组织施压特朗普政府，反对英国潜在政策动向", "美方指责英国提案可能削弱专利价值，引发跨大西洋摩擦"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注英美政策分歧，预判欧洲 SEP 许可规则演变趋势", "强化全球专利组合管理，灵活应对跨法域许可谈判挑战"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 英国 SEP 政策咨询引发美欧博弈，直接影响欧洲专利许可环境。

news_items.title_zh: 德法院禁三星基于英声明向 ETSI 投诉
news_items.summary: Meanwhile English judge expresses concerns about InterDigital’s evidence to UPC and Munich Regional Court
news_items.content: Meanwhile English judge expresses concerns about InterDigital’s evidence to UPC and Munich Regional Court
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 德国法院裁定禁止三星依据其在英国的声明向 ETSI 提起投诉，凸显跨国 SEP 纠纷中管辖权冲突。与此同时，英国法官对 InterDigital 向统一专利法院（UPC）及慕尼黑地区法院提交的证据表示担忧，反映多国并行诉讼中证据标准与司法互认的复杂性。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应对 SEP 纠纷时，需警惕不同法域裁判冲突风险。应统筹英、德及 UPC 诉讼策略，确保证据链在各国法院均具说服力，避免因单一法域不利裁定影响全局。

news_items.summary: WiseHarbor Founder Keith Mallinson makes the case that the proposed interventions around essentiality checking and top-down valuation risk introducing instability rather than clarity and predictability
news_items.content: WiseHarbor Founder Keith Mallinson makes the case that the proposed interventions around essentiality checking and top-down valuation risk introducing instability rather than clarity and predictability
news_items.ai_summary_zh: WiseHarbor 创始人基思·马林森针对英国知识产权局（UKIPO）关于标准必要专利（SEP）的咨询提出批评。他指出，拟议的必要性检查干预及基于专利数量的“自上而下”估值方法，非但不能带来清晰度和可预测性，反而可能破坏 FRAND 许可体系的稳定性，引发市场不确定性。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国企业需警惕英国 SEP 政策变动带来的许可成本波动。建议密切关注 UKIPO 最终政策走向，提前评估专利组合价值，避免单纯依赖专利数量进行费率抗辩，并准备多元化许可谈判策略以应对潜在规则风险。

news_items.title: Huawei, MediaTek settle cellular SEP dispute
news_items.title_zh: 华为与联发科达成蜂窝标准必要专利和解
news_items.summary: Settlement ends almost 50 cases in component-level licensing spat
news_items.content: Settlement ends almost 50 cases in component-level licensing spat
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 华为与联发科就蜂窝标准必要专利（SEP）纠纷达成全面和解，结束了双方在组件级许可问题上长达数年的近 50 起诉讼。此次和解标志着两大科技巨头在 FRAND 原则下的许可谈判取得突破，避免了潜在的禁令风险，为欧洲半导体及通信行业的组件级许可模式提供了重要的商业先例，有助于稳定相关供应链的法律预期。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应重视组件级许可趋势，提前布局 SEP 谈判策略。建议建立完善的专利风险评估机制，避免陷入高额诉讼成本，同时利用和解案例争取更合理的许可条件，保障供应链安全。

news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 华为与联发科和解涉及欧洲 SEP 许可纠纷，直接影响在欧组件级许可实践。

news_items.title: Nokia, InterDigital, Qualcomm win landmark SEP confidentiality appeal in UK
news_items.title_zh: 诺基亚等企业在英赢得 SEP 保密上诉里程碑胜诉
news_items.summary: Huawei, Google and LG Electronics also among successful appellants
news_items.content: Huawei, Google and LG Electronics also among successful appellants
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 英国上诉法院作出里程碑式裁决，支持诺基亚、InterDigital 及高通等关于标准必要专利（SEP）保密性的上诉。华为、谷歌和 LG 电子亦作为上诉人获胜。该判决重新界定了 SEP 诉讼中敏感商业信息的披露范围与保护机制，对平衡专利权人与实施者利益具有深远影响，确立了新的程序性先例。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧 SEP 诉讼需重视保密令策略，避免因信息披露不当受损。建议提前规划证据分级管理，利用此判例争取更有利的诉讼保护条件，同时关注英国作为全球 SEP 诉讼地的规则变化。

news_items.title: Cellular IOT patents: navigating a complex SEP licensing landscape
news_items.title_zh: 蜂窝物联网专利： navigating 复杂 SEP 许可格局
news_items.summary: Cellular connectivity has become a cornerstone of the IOT, enabling billions of devices across industries to communicate seamlessly. As the market scales, so too does the importance of licensing SEPs covering cellular IOT standards. However, IOT licensing practices remain complex.
news_items.content:
Cellular connectivity has become a cornerstone of the IOT, enabling billions of devices across industries to communicate seamlessly. As the market scales, so too does the importance of licensing SEPs covering cellular IOT standards. Yet, unlike smartphones, where SEP licensing frameworks are well established, IOT licensing practices remain fragmented and complex, and are still in their infancy.

A new LexisNexis report, “ Who is Leading the Cellular IoT Patent Race? ”, sheds light on this evolving space by identifying the major SEP owners across NB-IOT (low-power sensors/meters), LTE-M (low-power wide-area connectivity), Cat 1 (cellular standard for higher data like payment terminals) and V2X (vehicle-to-vehicle/infrastructure), and by analysing how portfolio quality reshapes the competitive landscape. The study also highlights the growing role of patent licensing programs and identifies increasing patent acquisition activity by patent assertion entities (PAEs), which underscores the importance of transparency and reliable data, especially as licensing frameworks are still emerging.

The challenge of SEP licensing in IOT

IOT applications span a broad spectrum: from smart metering in utilities to asset tracking in logistics, livestock monitoring in agriculture, smart city infrastructure, industrial automation, fleet management, consumer wearables and environmental monitoring. Each of these verticals integrates connectivity standards differently depending on performance requirements, regulatory frameworks and end-user value.

This diversity makes a single, uniform approach to SEP licensing impractical. While the smartphone ecosystem converged on relatively predictable royalty frameworks, IOT adoption presents unique difficulties. The value contributed by cellular standards differs dramatically between, for example, a connected watch and a smart electricity meter. Without clear valuation metrics and clear royalty benchmarks, negotiations under FRAND terms remain uncertain.

The lack of transparency in declared patent data compounds the challenge. Standards developed by 3GPP, including NB-IoT, LTE-M, Cat 1 and V2X, meet different technical requirements. However, ETSI’s declaration database typically links patents only to broad technical specifications. Mapping a declared SEP to a specific IOT feature requires additional analysis, which is not available in the public domain. This data gap hinders both licensors and licensees in assessing market shares and negotiating royalties.

Patent pools (eg, Sisvel’s IOT pool and Avanci’s smart meter and EV charging programmes) offer some structure but only cover a subset of the SEP landscape. Many leading patent holders continue to negotiate bilaterally, while others combine pool participation with selective direct licensing.

Each of these verticals comes with its own technology stack, market structure and end-user value proposition, which complicates negotiations for standards implementers. As IOT adoption grows and connectivity becomes ubiquitous across industries, the need for scalable, fair and sector-specific SEP licensing models will only become more pressing.

Building a clearer patent landscape

To identify patents relevant to cellular IOT standards, LexisNexis began with worldwide patents declared to ETSI under the 4G and 5G technical specifications, applying software featuring an AI-powered algorithm trained on datasets of verified positives (confirmed cellular IOT SEPs) and negatives (patents unrelated to IOT standards) to detect patents related to NB-IoT, LTE-M, LTE-Cat 1 and V2X. Random samples from the resulting landscape were reviewed by subject-matter experts to validate relevance and flag misclassifications, and draft landscapes were shared with key SEP owners for feedback. This review and validation process was carried out in several iterations, with findings continuously fed back into the model to improve accuracy. The final output is a patent landscape that has been reviewed and validated by both experts and industry stakeholders to ensure reliability and coverage.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 文章指出蜂窝物联网市场扩张加剧了标准必要专利（SEP）许可的重要性，但相比手机领域，其许可实践仍碎片化且缺乏透明度。ETSI 数据库仅关联宽泛技术规范，导致具体功能映射困难。尽管存在 Sisvel 和 Avanci 等专利池，多数权利人仍倾向双边谈判，FRAND 费率因缺乏估值基准而充满不确定性。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国物联网企业出海需警惕许可碎片化风险，建议提前开展 FTO 分析并关注专利池动态。面对模糊的 FRAND 基准，应建立内部估值模型，积极争取透明数据以应对潜在诉讼或高额索赔。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["物联网垂直领域多样，单一统一许可模式难以适用，估值差异巨大", "ETSI 声明数据缺乏细粒度，阻碍许可双方评估市场份额与协商费率", "专利断言实体活动增加，专利池仅覆盖部分景观，双边谈判仍是主流"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["针对细分垂直领域建立差异化许可策略，避免套用手机行业费率基准", "强化专利数据情报能力，利用第三方报告弥补公开声明数据的颗粒度不足"]

news_items.title: InterDigital’s anti-interim licence injunctions mark SEP litigation turning point
news_items.title_zh: InterDigital 反临时许可禁令标志 SEP 诉讼转折点
news_items.summary: A major strategic tool for implementers has been undercut by last week’s revelations
news_items.content: A major strategic tool for implementers has been undercut by last week’s revelations
news_items.ai_summary_zh: InterDigital 近期获得的反临时许可禁令成为标准必要专利（SEP）诉讼的战略转折点。该裁决削弱了实施者长期以来利用临时许可作为防御手段的策略，表明欧洲法院（特别是 UPC）更倾向于保护专利权人利益。这一变化迫使实施者重新评估其 FRAND 抗辩路径及诉讼风险，标志着 SEP 执法环境趋于严厉。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临更高诉讼风险，需提前布局 FRAND 合规证据链。建议避免依赖临时许可拖延战术，转而寻求早期实质性谈判或全球和解，以降低被颁禁令导致市场禁入的风险。

news_items.title_zh: 突发：比亚迪签署 Avanci 4G 专利许可协议
news_items.summary: The world’s largest EV maker becomes first known Chinese licensee for Avanci’s connected vehicle programmes
news_items.content: The world’s largest EV maker becomes first known Chinese licensee for Avanci’s connected vehicle programmes
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 全球最大电动汽车制造商比亚迪正式签署 Avanci 4G 专利许可协议，成为该平台车联网项目中首个已知的中国被许可人。此举标志着长期僵持的欧洲汽车 SEP 许可谈判取得关键突破，表明主要中国车企开始接受基于 FRAND 原则的全球专利池许可模式，有助于缓解潜在的跨境诉讼风险。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国车企应正视欧洲 SEP 许可常态，主动评估专利池方案以降低高额诉讼与禁令风险。建议建立专项合规机制，平衡自研与授权成本，避免在市场扩张期因 IP 纠纷受阻。

news_items.title: AOMedia announces launch of 'royalty-free' AV2 codec
news_items.title_zh: AOMedia 宣布推出免版税 AV2 编解码器
news_items.summary: Predecessor codec AV1 created controversy as non-AOMedia patent holders rejected the royalty free premise, instead licensing bilaterally or via three patent pools
news_items.content: Predecessor codec AV1 created controversy as non-AOMedia patent holders rejected the royalty free premise, instead licensing bilaterally or via three patent pools
news_items.ai_summary_zh: AOMedia 正式推出新一代 AV2 视频编解码器，延续其免版税策略。然而，前代 AV1 曾因非成员专利权人拒绝免版税前提而引发争议，导致部分权利人选择双边许可或通过专利池授权。这一动态凸显了开源标准与私有专利权益在欧洲及全球市场的博弈，可能引发新的许可纠纷或反垄断关注。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧使用或开发视频编码技术时，需警惕“免版税”声明背后的潜在专利风险。建议提前开展 FTO 分析，评估非 AOMedia 成员专利持有人的许可主张，避免陷入侵权诉讼或被迫接受不利许可条款。

news_items.title: Xiaomi sued by eighth UPC plaintiff; files UK FRAND action against Asus/Innovative Sonic
news_items.title_zh: 小米遭第八起 UPC 起诉并在英发起 FRAND 诉讼
news_items.summary: Chinese company targeted with former Intel patent by AX Wireless
news_items.content: Chinese company targeted with former Intel patent by AX Wireless
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 中国科技企业小米成为统一专利法院（UPC）第八位被告，涉案专利原属英特尔，现由 AX Wireless 持有。与此同时，小米在英国主动对华硕及 Innovative Sonic 提起 FRAND 费率诉讼。该动态显示中欧专利博弈升级，企业正利用 UPC 与英国法院双轨策略应对标准必要专利纠纷。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国企业需警惕 NPE 利用 UPC 快速禁令机制。建议提前评估专利组合稳定性，善用英国法院确定全球 FRAND 费率，以平衡诉讼风险并掌握谈判主动权。

news_items.title: Comparable licences in FRAND negotiations: a principled starting point for valuation
news_items.title_zh: FRAND 谈判中的可比许可：估值的原则性起点
news_items.summary: The UK Court of Appeal Optis v Apple case demonstrates the importance of anchoring FRAND determinations in real-world licensing practices
news_items.content: The UK Court of Appeal Optis v Apple case demonstrates the importance of anchoring FRAND determinations in real-world licensing practices
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 本文基于英国上诉法院 Optis 诉 Apple 案，分析标准必要专利（SEP）FRAND 费率确定的关键原则。文章指出，法院强调必须将 FRAND 裁定锚定于现实世界的许可实践，特别是利用可比许可协议作为估值的起始点。该判例确立了以实际市场数据为核心的裁判逻辑，为后续类似纠纷提供了明确的法律指引，强化了英国在 SEP 全球管辖中的重要地位。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧涉及 SEP 纠纷时，应高度重视可比许可证据的收集与构建。建议提前梳理全球许可组合，确保能提供符合英国法院标准的“现实世界”数据，以争取更有利的费率裁定，避免因举证不足而陷入被动。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国上诉法院强调 FRAND 裁定需锚定现实许可实践", "可比许可协议被确认为专利费率估值的原则性起点", "Optis 诉 Apple 案确立了基于市场数据的裁判新基准"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["企业需建立全球许可数据库以应对英国法院举证要求", "利用可比协议作为核心证据是争取有利 FRAND 费率的关键"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 英国上诉法院 SEP 判例确立 FRAND 许可费评估原则，直接影响在欧企业。
news_items.title_en: Comparable licences in FRAND negotiations: a principled starting point for valuation

可比许可协议被确认为专利费率估值的原则性起点

news_items.title: Patents & trade secrets as comprehensive protection mechanisms
news_items.title_zh: 专利与商业秘密作为综合保护机制的策略分析
news_items.summary: Article on the protection of innovations through patents and trade secrets by Prof. Goddar, M. Müller, and others in Les Nouvelles 09/2025
news_items.content:
In Volume VIII, No. 3, September 2025, of les Nouvelles, the magazine of the Licensing Executives Society International (LESI), BOEHMERT & BOEHMERT attorneys Prof. Dr. Heinz Goddar (patent attorney) and Melanie Müller (attorney at law) are co-authors of the article “Patents and trade secrets as complementary protection mechanisms.” The article is based on a workshop conducted by the authors at the LESI Conference 2025 in Singapore. Other co-authors are, in alphabetical order, Peter Camesasca, DuckSoon Chang, Joo Sup Kim, Ralph Nack, Ichiro Nakatomi, and Jonathan Porath.

The article highlights the strategic combination of patents and trade secrets as complementary protection mechanisms for innovations. While patents grant exclusive rights of use for a limited period of time through disclosure, trade secrets offer potentially unlimited protection for confidential information – provided that secrecy is actively maintained. In practice, both instruments are often used together: patents protect the core technology, while know-how for implementation, optimization processes, or training data are treated as trade secrets.

In addition, the authors highlight different approaches in the European Union, Germany, Japan, and Korea, and identify the challenges posed by generative AI as a central issue. As an innovative solution, the authors propose a “trusted depository” for trade secrets – a trustworthy, blockchain-based system for the secure, tamper-proof storage of confidential information – but also discuss the legal risks that may be associated with its use.

In conclusion, the authors emphasize that trade secrets play an increasingly important role in protecting innovation, especially in areas where formal property rights do not apply. The combination of patents and secrecy represents an effective but complex protection model that brings with it new legal and strategic challenges. A trusted depository could help overcome these challenges while maintaining the balance between protection and competition.

Members of the Licensing Executives Society International (LESI) can download the full article here .
news_items.ai_summary_zh: Boehmert & Boehmert 律师在 LESI 期刊发文，探讨专利与商业秘密的互补保护策略。文章对比欧盟、德国等法域差异，指出生成式 AI 带来的新挑战，并提出基于区块链的“可信托管”方案以平衡保护与竞争，强调两者结合是应对非正式权利领域创新的关键复杂模型。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局应摒弃单一专利思维，构建“专利 + 秘密”组合拳。针对 AI 训练数据等难以专利化资产，需强化内部保密体系并评估新型存证工具，以应对欧盟日益复杂的合规与竞争环境。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["专利披露换限时独占，商业秘密需主动保密但可无限期保护", "生成式 AI 引发新挑战，作者提出区块链可信托管作为创新解法", "核心技术与实施诀窍的组合保护模式面临新的法律战略挑战"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["构建专利与商业秘密互补架构，覆盖核心技术及实施诀窍", "关注 AI 时代数据保护新趋势，审慎评估区块链存证法律风险"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 文章深入探讨欧盟专利与商业秘密互补策略及 AI 挑战，具核心参考价值。

news_items.title: Avanci 5G platform has met expectations but there’s more to do, says top executive
news_items.title_zh: Avanci 高管：5G 平台达预期但仍需努力
news_items.summary: Laurie Fitzgerald speaks to IAM to mark the second anniversary of the 5G-era vehicle offering
news_items.content: Laurie Fitzgerald speaks to IAM to mark the second anniversary of the 5G-era vehicle offering
news_items.ai_summary_zh: Avanci 项目负责人 Laurie Fitzgerald 在接受 IAM 采访时指出，其 5G 车辆许可平台上线两周年以来表现符合预期，成功推动了汽车行业对标准必要专利的合规获取。然而，她强调面对复杂的全球供应链及不断演变的 FRAND 原则挑战，平台在扩大许可覆盖范围与优化费率结构方面仍有大量工作亟待完成。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国车企及零部件出口商应密切关注 Avanci 平台费率调整动向，评估潜在许可成本。建议提前梳理自身 5G 专利组合，积极参与 FRAND 谈判或反诉准备，以在欧洲市场规避侵权诉讼风险并争取有利条款。

news_items.title: Implementers shouldn’t read too much into Roku’s FRAND rate-setting suit dismissal
news_items.title_zh: 实施者不应过度解读 Roku 案驳回对 FRAND 费率的影响
news_items.summary: Saturday Opinion: US courts lack the authority to compel a licensee to take a global licence, but the situation is different when a licensee seeks to hold a SEP holder to its FRAND commitments
news_items.content: Saturday Opinion: US courts lack the authority to compel a licensee to take a global licence, but the situation is different when a licensee seeks to hold a SEP holder to its FRAND commitments
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 本文评论指出，美国法院驳回 Roku 案件仅表明其无权强制被许可人接受全球许可，但这不意味着 SEP 持有人可逃避 FRAND 承诺。当被许可人主动寻求执行 FRAND 义务时，法律情境截然不同。该区分对理解跨辖区 SEP 纠纷及全球费率裁定至关重要，欧洲从业者需警惕误读。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应对 SEP 纠纷时，不可简单援引美国判例抗辩全球许可。应重视欧盟及 UPC 对 FRAND 的独立解释，提前布局合规许可谈判，避免因误判法域差异导致禁令风险或赔偿损失。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["美法院无权强制被许可人签署全球许可协议", "被许可人主动维权时 SEP 持有人须履行 FRAND", "实施者切勿因个案驳回而低估全球许可风险"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["勿将美国程序性驳回等同于实体 FRAND 义务免除", "在欧经营需优先遵循欧盟法院与 UPC 的裁判逻辑"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 虽涉美国诉讼，但 FRAND 原则具全球通用性，深刻影响欧洲 SEP 许可策略。

news_items.content: The patent seller has been ordered to supply information to the NPE under the Section 1782 framework

news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临 SEP 诉讼时，需警惕对手利用美国取证规则获取不利许可证据。建议提前评估全球许可组合的保密风险，并在 FRAND 抗辩中充分考量跨境数据披露对费率认定的潜在冲击。

news_items.title: Alibaba, ZTE join Access Advance video streaming pool as licensors
news_items.title_zh: 阿里与中兴加入 Access Advance 视频流媒体专利池
news_items.summary: Chinese platform Youku is the latest to be licensed, with Access Advance extending discounts for licensees through 30 September
news_items.content: Chinese platform Youku is the latest to be licensed, with Access Advance extending discounts for licensees through 30 September
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 阿里巴巴与中兴通讯正式加入 Access Advance 视频流媒体专利池成为许可方，标志着中国企业在标准必要专利领域话语权提升。同时，该平台宣布将对中国视频平台优酷的许可延期至九月，并延长对现有被许可人的折扣优惠，旨在促进全球视频编码技术的广泛合规采用。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应积极评估自身 SEP 资产，考虑从被许可方转向许可方角色以获取收益。同时需关注国际专利池费率变化，利用折扣窗口期完成合规布局，降低出口欧洲的侵权风险。

news_items.title: Part two: Three cases highlight key difficulties with the UK interim SEP licence regime
news_items.title_zh: 三起案例凸显英国 SEP 临时许可制度关键难题
news_items.summary: IAM is a unique and timely intelligence service that treats IP as a business asset and tool rather than simply as a legal right, informing boardrooms worldwide.
news_items.content: The Court of Appeal’s decisions in Panasonic, Ericsson and the High Court’s decision in Samsung v ZTE raise questions over the application of the interim SEP licence regime in the United Kingdom – particularly with regard to the ‘useful purpose’ test, the inclusion of an adjustment clause and commercial use the SEP owner can make of the money paid by the implementer.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 本文基于松下、爱立信上诉案及三星诉中兴高院判决，深入剖析英国标准必要专利（SEP）临时许可制度的适用困境。核心争议集中在“有用目的”测试标准的界定、费率调整条款的纳入必要性，以及专利权人对实施者支付资金的商业使用权。这些司法动态揭示了当前规则在平衡双方利益时的模糊地带，为后续 FRAND 许可谈判与诉讼带来不确定性。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国企业应高度关注英国法院对临时许可条件的收紧趋势，提前规划资金合规用途。建议在涉及 SEP 纠纷时，审慎评估“有用目的”抗辩风险，并在谈判中争取明确的费率调整机制，以规避单方资金锁定带来的商业被动。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["司法判例质疑英国 SEP 临时许可中“有用目的”测试的具体适用标准", "临时许可协议是否应包含费率调整条款成为案件争议焦点之一", "法院需明确 SEP 权利人对实施者预付许可费的具体商业使用权限"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["需预判英国法院对临时许可资金用途的审查，做好合规预案", "在 FRAND 谈判中主动引入费率调整条款，降低长期诉讼风险"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 聚焦英国 SEP 临时许可制度司法实践，直接影响欧洲专利诉讼策略。

news_items.title: Nokia disputes with Acer, Asus and Hisense raise new SEP questions for English courts
news_items.title_zh: 诺基亚诉宏碁等案引发英国法院 SEP 新难题
news_items.summary: Arbitration offer and specific performance dispute pose new conundrums for London judges
news_items.content: Arbitration offer and specific performance dispute pose new conundrums for London judges
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 诺基亚与宏碁、华硕及海信的标准必要专利纠纷进入英国法院，提出关于仲裁要约效力及特定履行救济的新法律问题。伦敦法官需裁决在 FRAND 原则下，被告拒绝仲裁是否影响禁令颁发，以及法院如何平衡双方利益，此举可能重塑全球 SEP 诉讼策略。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海企业需警惕英国成为 SEP 诉讼高地，重新评估应对仲裁要约的策略。建议在许可谈判中谨慎处理程序性提议，避免因拒绝仲裁而面临更严厉的禁令风险，同时做好多地诉讼预案。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["诺基亚与多家厂商纠纷触及仲裁要约法律效力问题", "英国法院面临是否裁定特定履行救济的司法难题", "案件判决将为全球 SEP 许可谈判树立新的风向标"]

news_items.title: Access Advance welcomes US, UK court alignment on important FRAND questions
news_items.title_zh: Access Advance 欢迎美英法院就关键 FRAND 问题达成一致
news_items.summary: Courts in both countries are sending a strong signal to unwilling licensees, Chief Legal Officer John Kinton tells IAM
news_items.content: Courts in both countries are sending a strong signal to unwilling licensees, Chief Legal Officer John Kinton tells IAM
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 专利池管理机构 Access Advance 首席法务官指出，美国与英国法院近期在标准必要专利（SEP）FRAND 许可费率及禁令救济问题上展现出高度一致的司法立场。这种跨法域的协同向不愿配合许可的实施者发出了强烈信号，表明英美司法体系正共同强化对专利权人的保护，有助于统一全球 SEP 争议解决预期，减少管辖权挑选空间。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海企业需警惕英美司法联动带来的合规压力，避免采取拖延谈判策略。建议提前评估产品 SEP 风险，主动寻求符合 FRAND 原则的许可方案，以防在两地同时面临禁令或高额赔偿风险，确保欧洲市场准入安全。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["美英法院在 FRAND 核心问题上形成司法协同，强化对不愿许可者的威慑", "Access Advance 认为该趋势有利于建立稳定、可预测的全球 SEP 许可环境", "司法一致性减少了实施者利用不同法域规则差异进行策略性诉讼的空间"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["英美司法趋同增加了实施者规避许可的成本与法律不确定性风险", "在欧中企应建立 proactive 许可策略，避免因消极应对遭遇双重司法打击"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 涉及英国法院 FRAND 裁判动态，直接影响欧洲 SEP 许可格局及在欧中企合规策略。

news_items.title: BREAKING: European Commission reportedly confirms withdrawal of SEP regulation
news_items.title_zh: 突发：欧委会据报确认撤回标准必要专利监管法规
news_items.summary: Nokia and IP Europe were quick to welcome word of the controversial policy’s abandonment
news_items.content: Nokia and IP Europe were quick to welcome word of the controversial policy’s abandonment
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟委员会据报已正式确认撤回备受争议的标准必要专利（SEP）监管法规提案。该政策曾引发业界广泛讨论，其废弃消息迅速获得诺基亚及 IP Europe 等关键利益相关方的欢迎。此举标志着欧盟在 SEP 许可框架上的立法干预暂时终止，现有法律与市场自律机制将继续主导该领域。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧 SEP 许可谈判中面临的不确定性降低，无需应对新规合规成本。建议继续依托 FRAND 原则开展许可，密切关注后续市场动态，利用当前稳定窗口期优化专利布局与诉讼策略。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟委员会确认撤回争议的 SEP 监管法规提案", "诺基亚与 IP Europe 等业界代表对政策废弃表示欢迎", "欧洲 SEP 许可环境将维持现状，暂无新立法干预"]

news_items.title: Samsung and HP licences skyrocket Q2 revenue for InterDigital
news_items.title_zh: 三星与惠普许可助推 InterDigital 二季度营收飙升
news_items.content: "Our agreement with Samsung is the largest license InterDigital has ever signed, worth more than $1 billion in total contract value,” boasts InterDigital CEO Liren Chen
news_items.ai_summary_zh: InterDigital 宣布与三星达成该公司史上最大规模许可协议，总价值超 10 亿美元，并与惠普达成新许可。这两项交易显著推动其第二季度营收增长。尽管新闻未明确提及具体诉讼或判决，但巨额许可费反映了全球 SEP 持有人在欧洲及国际市场通过 FRAND 原则获取回报的商业动态。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧出口需警惕高额 SEP 许可费风险。建议提前评估产品专利覆盖率，积极参与 FRAND 谈判，避免被动接受天价条款，必要时利用欧盟竞争法规维护权益。

news_items.title_zh: Sisvel 大幅下调 Wi-Fi 6 池企业费率并公布被许可人
news_items.summary: Enterprise Access Point rate lowered by more than two-thirds, shortly after Cisco deal
news_items.content: Enterprise Access Point rate lowered by more than two-thirds, shortly after Cisco deal
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 专利池运营方 Sisvel 在与 Cisco 达成协议后，将 Wi-Fi 6 标准必要专利池中企业接入点的许可费率下调超过三分之二，并首次公开部分被许可人名单。此举旨在回应市场对费率过高的质疑，通过透明化策略推动更多企业达成 FRAND 许可，缓解潜在诉讼风险。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国网络设备制造商应关注费率下调后的合规窗口期，主动评估许可需求。建议利用公开名单比对自身状态，避免因未获许可面临 UPC 诉讼风险，同时可借机争取更优谈判条件。

news_items.title: BREAKING: Arbitrators grant InterDigital $1.05B for 8-year licence with Samsung
news_items.title_zh: 仲裁裁定三星向 InterDigital 支付 10.5 亿美元八年许可费
news_items.summary: The SEP renewal spans back to 2023 and gives InterDigital a hefty 67% increase from Samsung's former licence
news_items.content: The SEP renewal spans back to 2023 and gives InterDigital a hefty 67% increase from Samsung's former licence
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 仲裁庭裁定三星需向 InterDigital 支付 10.5 亿美元，以获取为期八年的标准必要专利（SEP）许可。该许可协议追溯至 2023 年生效，新费率较三星原有许可费用大幅上涨 67%。此裁决反映了当前全球 SEP 许可费率呈上升趋势，凸显了仲裁在解决 FRAND 许可纠纷中的关键作用及高昂的潜在合规成本。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临 SEP 许可费上涨压力，需重新评估专利储备与谈判策略。建议提前开展 FTO 分析，建立多元化争议解决机制，避免高额仲裁赔偿风险，并关注欧盟 SEP 监管新规动态。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["仲裁庭裁定三星支付 10.5 亿美元获八年 SEP 许可", "新许可费率较旧协议大幅上涨 67% 且追溯至 2023 年", "裁决显示 SEP 许可成本上升及仲裁解决机制的重要性"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕 SEP 许可费率普涨趋势，提前布局谈判筹码", "善用仲裁等替代性争议解决机制降低诉讼不确定性"]

news_items.title: Three cases highlight key difficulties with the UK interim SEP licence regime
news_items.title_zh: 三起案件凸显英国 SEP 临时许可制度关键难题
news_items.summary: IAM is a unique and timely intelligence service that treats IP as a business asset and tool rather than simply as a legal right, informing boardrooms worldwide.
news_items.content: The Court of Appeal’s decisions in Panasonic , Ericsson and the High Court’s decision in Samsung v ZTE raise questions over the application of the interim licence regime in the United Kingdom as they deal with potential breach of obligation to negotiate in good faith and risk interfering with the jurisdiction of other courts.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 英国上诉法院在松下、爱立信案及高等法院在三星诉中兴案中的判决，引发对英国临时许可制度适用的质疑。核心争议在于该制度是否干扰其他法域管辖权，以及当事人是否违反善意谈判义务，揭示了当前监管框架下的法律不确定性。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国企业需警惕英国临时许可程序的管辖扩张风险。建议完善全球谈判证据链，证明善意履约，避免因程序瑕疵陷入被动，同时评估多法域诉讼策略的协同效应。

news_items.title: Munich Regional Court reinterprets FRAND rules in Samsung vs ZTE
news_items.title_zh: 慕尼黑地方法院在三星诉中兴案中重构 FRAND 规则
news_items.summary: In ZTE vs Samsung, the 7th Civil Chamber of Munich Regional Court has set out new approaches to FRAND proceedings.
news_items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles Grünecker TALIENS DHS View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Marta Mendes Dr. Nadine Losleben Dr. Dirk Bröcher, LL.M. View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

In the pan-European dispute between ZTE and Samsung, the 7th Civil Chamber of Munich Regional Court has set out new approaches to FRAND proceedings. These deviate from the Higher Regional Court's position on one key point. Furthermore, the Regional Court found that the interim licence recently granted by the UK High Court is not decisive.

In a legal note following a “FRAND first” hearing, the Munich Regional Court’s 7th Civil Chamber laid out its approach to several questions not yet fully clarified by case law. The focus was on the significance of security deposits from patent users and the relevance of interim licences.

According to a spokesperson for Munich Regional Court, it remains unclear to what extent other chambers, particularly the 21st Civil Chamber which also handles patent law, will agree with the 7th Chamber’s assessments.

In November last year, Munich Higher Regional Court took the stance in HMD vs VoiceAge that “continuing willingness to take a licence” is met only if an implementer provides reasonable security, for example through a bank guarantee.

The Regional Court expressed doubts whether these principles would stand up in appeal proceedings at the Federal Court of Justice. The 7th Chamber takes a different view on what constitutes willingness.

According to the note, a licensee demonstrates willingness by quickly providing quantity information, having substantial own licensing relating to standards, being prepared to pay undisputed sums after sufficient negotiations, offering arbitration and providing security.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 慕尼黑地方法院第七民事庭在三星与中兴的泛欧纠纷中，提出了 FRAND 诉讼的新方法。法院质疑高等法院关于“提供担保即代表许可意愿”的观点，认为被许可人通过快速提供数量信息、参与仲裁及支付无争议款项等行为亦可证明意愿。此外，法院明确指出英国高等法院近期授予的临时许可不具有决定性效力，该判决可能引发联邦最高法院层面的进一步上诉。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在德应诉 SEP 案件时，应多元化举证“许可意愿”，避免仅依赖资金担保。需警惕英国临时许可在德效力受限，制定国别化诉讼策略，并预判案件可能上诉至联邦最高法院的时间成本。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院重新定义“许可意愿”，不再单一依赖银行担保作为判定标准", "明确裁定英国法院授予的临时许可在德国 FRAND 程序中非决定性因素", "第七民事庭观点可能与本院其他庭及上级法院存在分歧，上诉风险高"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["构建多维度的许可意愿证据链，降低因未提供担保而被判侵权的风险", "摒弃跨国许可互认幻想，针对德国司法实践独立准备抗辩与谈判方案"]

news_items.title: Xiaomi hit with German, Indian lawsuits by NPE wielding BlackBerry SEPs
news_items.title_zh: 小米遭持有黑莓 SEP 的 NPE 在德国和印度起诉
news_items.summary: Ireland-based Malikie Innovations is asserting five 4G and 5G patents against the Chinese smartphone giant
news_items.content: Ireland-based Malikie Innovations is asserting five 4G and 5G patents against the Chinese smartphone giant
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 爱尔兰实体 Malikie Innovations 作为非专利实施主体（NPE），依据其持有的黑莓标准必要专利组合，在德国和印度对小米提起专利侵权诉讼。该案涉及五项 4G 及 5G 关键技术专利，凸显了欧洲主要市场针对中国智能手机厂商的 SEP 许可纠纷升级趋势，德国作为关键司法管辖区再次成为诉讼焦点。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海企业需警惕 NPE 利用德国禁令救济施压。建议提前评估 SEP 组合风险，制定全球 FRAND 抗辩策略，并关注爱尔兰权利主体在欧洲的诉讼动向，避免供应链受阻。

news_items.title: Nokia sues Geely in Germany and UPC adding to Chinese carmaker SEP suits
news_items.title_zh: 诺基亚在德国及 UPC 起诉吉利，加剧中国车企 SEP 纠纷
news_items.summary: Disputes between Avanci licensors and Chinese auto brands are proliferating
news_items.content: Disputes between Avanci licensors and Chinese auto brands are proliferating
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 诺基亚已在德国法院及统一专利法院（UPC）对吉利提起标准必要专利诉讼。此举标志着 Avanci 专利池许可方与中国汽车品牌间的法律争端正在迅速扩散。案件凸显了欧洲尤其是德国和 UPC 作为全球 SEP 执法核心地的地位，预示着更多中国车企将面临类似的侵权指控与许可谈判压力。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国车企出口欧洲需高度警惕 SEP 诉讼风险，特别是德国与 UPC 的管辖权。建议提前开展 FTE 分析，评估专利池许可条款，制定积极的应诉或谈判策略，避免因禁令导致市场准入受阻。

news_items.content: Via hopes the pricing strategy that helped its audio pool break into China will give its HEVC/VVC programme the same boost
news_items.ai_summary_zh: Via Licensing Alliance 宣布中国手机厂商传音控股加入其 AAC 音频专利池。运营方计划复制该定价策略在中国市场的成功经验，将其应用于 HEVC/VVC 视频编码专利项目，旨在通过区域性费率调整提升全球许可效率与市场渗透率。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海企业应关注国际专利池的区域费率新动向，评估其对 FRAND 合规的影响。建议提前布局视频编码专利谈判，利用区域策略优化许可成本，避免潜在诉讼风险。

news_items.title: EXCLUSIVE: Samsung asks ETSI to remove ZTE patents from cellular standards
news_items.title_zh: 独家：三星请求 ETSI 移除中兴通讯的标准必要专利
news_items.summary: The rare clause 8.2 application follows English High Court interim licence declaration against the Chinese SEP owner in late June
news_items.content: The rare clause 8.2 application follows English High Court interim licence declaration against the Chinese SEP owner in late June
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 三星向欧洲电信标准协会（ETSI）提出罕见的第 8.2 条申请，要求将中兴通讯的专利从蜂窝标准中移除。此举紧随英国高等法院于六月下旬针对该中国 SEP 持有人作出的临时许可声明之后，标志着标准组织介入专利许可纠纷的激烈升级，反映了全球 SEP 博弈的新趋势。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临更复杂的 SEP 诉讼与标准剔除风险。建议密切关注英国判例对 ETSI 程序的影响，提前布局全球许可策略，避免单一法域败诉引发连锁反应，并加强与标准组织的沟通机制。

news_items.title: UKIPO proposes SEP regulatory measures and launches consultation
news_items.title_zh: 英国知识产权局提议 SEP 监管措施并启动咨询
news_items.summary: The UK government is proposing a new rate-setting mechanism and a requirement to disclose information about SEPs
news_items.content: The UK government is proposing a new rate-setting mechanism and a requirement to disclose information about SEPs
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 英国政府针对标准必要专利（SEP）领域提出新的监管框架，旨在解决许可效率与透明度问题。核心举措包括建立全新的费率设定机制，以及强制要求披露 SEP 相关信息。目前该提案已进入公众咨询阶段，标志着英国在 SEP 治理上试图脱离纯司法个案裁判，转向行政干预与规则引导并行的新模式。

news_items.title: No stay for Huawei in UK FRAND trial against MediaTek
news_items.title_zh: 英国高院驳回华为中止联发科 FRAND 诉讼及上诉许可申请
news_items.summary: The UK High Court dismisses Huawei's second bid to stay FRAND rate-setting case against MediaTek and denies leave to appeal.
news_items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles GOTTSCHALD Grünecker Meissner Bolte Patentanwälte Rechtsanwälte Partnerschaft mbB View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Dr. Lukas Bischoff Prof. Willem Hoyng Matthew Royle, Ph.D. View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

Meissner Bolte Patentanwälte Rechtsanwälte Partnerschaft mbB

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

The global SEP dispute between Huawei and MediaTek looks set to proceed in the UK, as the Chinese mobile phone manufacturer has once again failed in its bid to suspend the FRAND case at the High Court.

The UK High Court’s refusal to suspend the case means the FRAND rate-setting proceedings for Huawei’s 5G portfolio can now continue unimpeded. High Court judge Thomas Leech also denied Huawei permission to appeal his decision (case ID: HP-2024-000028 ). However, Huawei may still petition the Court of Appeal directly for leave to appeal.

In a global SEPS dispute between the two parties, spanning China, Germany and the UPC, MediaTek sought a global FRAND-rate determination for Huawei’s patent portfolio from the UK High Court. Huawei contested the court’s jurisdiction to set a global FRAND rate, and alternatively applied for a stay on case-management grounds.

In March, judge Leech rejected this challenge, affirming the court’s competence to rule on MediaTek’s request and dismissing the stay application.

On 10 April 2025, Huawei filed a further application seeking a second case-management stay, supported by four new witness statements and a skeleton argument. Last Friday, judge Leech again declined to stay the case.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 英国高等法院再次驳回华为请求中止与联发科全球费率裁决案的决定，并拒绝授予上诉许可。法官 Thomas Leech 确认法院有权裁定全球 FRAND 费率，认为华为提出的案件管理理由不足以暂停程序。尽管无法直接上诉，华为仍可向上诉法院直接申请许可。此案是双方在全球多地（含中国、德国、UPC）平行诉讼的关键一环，英国程序将继续推进。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临 SEP 诉讼时，利用程序性理由拖延策略在英国愈发困难。建议企业提前布局全球费率抗辩证据，评估直接向上诉法院申请的可行性，并统筹中、德、英及 UPC 多地诉讼策略，避免因单一法域失利导致全球被动。

news_items.content: ByteDance, Kuaishou, NTT Docomo and Tencent have joined as dual licensees and licensors
news_items.ai_summary_zh: Access Advance 管理的视频流媒体标准必要专利池宣布显著扩张，新增 31 家许可人。字节跳动、快手、NTT Docomo 和腾讯四家巨头以“双重身份”（既是许可人也是被许可人）加入该池。此举标志着主流视频技术持有者与实施者进一步达成许可共识，旨在简化全球尤其是欧洲市场的专利授权流程，降低交易成本并减少潜在诉讼风险。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国视频与科技企业应重视国际专利池动向，评估加入主流池的合规效益。双重身份模式可平衡收支，建议企业主动梳理自有 SEP 资产，利用集体许可机制规避在欧洲市场的单体诉讼风险，优化全球 IP 运营策略。

news_items.title: UK IPO launches SEPs consultation
news_items.title_zh: 英国知识产权局启动标准必要专利（SEP）改革咨询
news_items.summary: The IPKat blog reports on copyright, patent, trade mark, info-tech and confidentiality issues from a mainly UK and European perspective.
news_items.content:
The UK Government has today launched a consultation on Standard Essential Patents (SEPs) . SEPs are patents that protect technology which is essential to implementing a technical standard (such as 5G). This new consultation has been launched with the aim of addressing potential problems with the UK's SEP ecosystem. The current SEP has been criticised for inefficiencies that that create barriers to innovation, particularly for smaller businesses seeking to implement standardised technologies. These challenges include knowledge and information gaps between SEP holders and implementers, a lack of transparency in the SEPs licencing process, and a costly and often complex dispute resolution environment. Additionally, resolving disputes can be costly and time-consuming. Did someone say SEP consultation?! In response to these challenges, the Government is consulting on some proposed policy options aimed at ensuring the UK's SEP framework operates more efficiently, supporting both patent holders and technology implementers. The proposals aim to reduce frictions in licencing, achieve greater efficiency in dispute resolution, and more effectively deal with knowledge and information gaps between parties. Perhaps the most significant proposal is that of introducing a specialist track to provide licence rates for SEP portfolios on a case-by-case basis. The aim of this would be to increase consistency and transparency in SEP pricing, in order to give businesses of all sizes a more efficient and cost-effective route to obtain SEP licence rates. The government is also proposing to require patent holders to disclose standard-related patent information to the IPO. This proposal is aimed at addressing the current opacity around SEPs and licensing obligations. The consultation also seeks evidence on several other potential interventions: Pre-action protocols to encourage early disclosure of relevant information in negotiations Essentiality checking solutions to determine whether government should introduce an essentiality determination opinion service SEP remedies to ensure the patent framework provides adequate dispute resolution mechanisms Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) measures to understand current provision and accessibility Read the full consolation documents here . Speaking about the launch of the consultation, the Minister for Intellectual Property Feryal Clark MP said: " Intellectual property is central to the Government’s growth mission and underpins the technologies that power our connected future, from 5G and electric vehicles to smart manufacturing and healthcare. “This consultation will help make the licensing of these technologies more straight forward and accessible - driving innovation, reducing costly litigation, and helping UK firms lead in developing the technologies of tomorrow. " The initial response from key industry bodies has been notably positive. Sarah Vaughan, President of the IP Federation , welcomed the "Government's open and evidence-based approach," supporting measures that enhance transparency and facilitate fair licensing negotiations. Bobby Mukherjee, President of CIPA, highlighted the UK patent profession's expertise in the SEP arena and welcomed the IPO's "energy and vision" in this vital area. The consultation runs until 7 October 2025 . The government is particularly keen to hear from businesses developing or using standardised technologies about how the proposed measures could affect their innovation, investment, and growth plans.

The UK Government has today launched a consultation on Standard Essential Patents (SEPs) . SEPs are patents that protect technology which is essential to implementing a technical standard (such as 5G). This new consultation has been launched with the aim of addressing potential problems with the UK's SEP ecosystem.

The current SEP has been criticised for inefficiencies that that create barriers to innovation, particularly for smaller businesses seeking to implement standardised technologies. These challenges include knowledge and information gaps between SEP holders and implementers, a lack of transparency in the SEPs licencing process, and a costly and often complex dispute resolution environment. Additionally, resolving disputes can be costly and time-consuming.

In response to these challenges, the Government is consulting on some proposed policy options aimed at ensuring the UK's SEP framework operates more efficiently, supporting both patent holders and technology implementers. The proposals aim to reduce frictions in licencing, achieve greater efficiency in dispute resolution, and more effectively deal with knowledge and information gaps between parties.

Perhaps the most significant proposal is that of introducing a specialist track to provide licence rates for SEP portfolios on a case-by-case basis. The aim of this would be to increase consistency and transparency in SEP pricing, in order to give businesses of all sizes a more efficient and cost-effective route to obtain SEP licence rates. The government is also proposing to require patent holders to disclose standard-related patent information to the IPO. This proposal is aimed at addressing the current opacity around SEPs and licensing obligations.

The consultation also seeks evidence on several other potential interventions:

Pre-action protocols to encourage early disclosure of relevant information in negotiations

Essentiality checking solutions to determine whether government should introduce an essentiality determination opinion service

SEP remedies to ensure the patent framework provides adequate dispute resolution mechanisms

Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) measures to understand current provision and accessibility
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 英国政府针对标准必要专利（SEP）生态系统低效、缺乏透明度及争议解决成本高等问题，正式启动政策咨询。核心提案包括设立专家轨道以确定个案许可费率、强制披露专利信息、引入必要性审查意见服务及优化替代性争议解决机制，旨在平衡专利权人与实施者利益，降低中小企业创新壁垒。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国企业应密切关注英国 SEP 规则变革，提前评估专利披露义务与费率裁定风险。建议积极参与咨询反馈，利用新机制降低许可谈判成本，并调整全球 FRAND 策略以适应更透明的监管环境。

news_items.title: CMS strengthens team with two UPC and SEP litigators from Klaka and Freshfields
news_items.title_zh: CMS 吸纳两名 UPC 及 SEP 诉讼律师以强化团队
news_items.summary: CMS Hasche Sigle has recruited two new partners, Stephan Dorn from Freshfields and Constantin Kurtz from Klaka.
news_items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles KATHER AUGENSTEIN NLO | European Patent & Trademark Attorneys EIP View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Dr. Andrew Lin Denis Monégier du Sorbier Prof. Dr. Heinz Goddar View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

NLO | European Patent & Trademark Attorneys

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Patent partner moves are currently in vogue, and the CMS network is no exception. Its German law firm CMS Hasche Sigle has recruited two new partners. Stephan Dorn joins from Freshfields and Constantin Kurtz from Klaka. These hires significantly expand CMS' European patent litigation team with a view to the UPC.

Despite established teams in Germany and the UK, CMS’ pan-European patent practice has so far lacked visibility in UPC litigation. CMS does not act as a merged practice, but through the respective patent teams of its network law firms, such as CMS Hasche Sigle. These cooperate closely in patent law, but neither the German nor UK practices have yet appeared before the new court. This is now set to change.

Stephan Dorn will join as partner in the Düsseldorf office on 1 July. The 46-year-old was previously counsel in Freshfields’ patent team. He began his career as a trainee lawyer at Hogan Lovells in 2012 before becoming an associate in the patent team.

In summer 2017, Dorn joined the Freshfields patent team led by Frank-Erich Hufnagel. Dorn has focused on SEP and FRAND litigation since the beginning of his career.

Dorn was part of the Freshfields team that advised Continental and Lenovo in lawsuits filed by Nokia over mobile phone patents. With the launch of the UPC, he became increasingly prominent.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 德国 CMS Hasche Sigle 律所从 Freshfields 和 Klaka 引进两位合伙人，旨在提升其在统一专利法院（UPC）的诉讼能力。此前该所虽在德英有基础，但尚未涉足 UPC 诉讼。新加入的 Stephan Dorn 专长于标准必要专利及 FRAND 纠纷，曾参与诺基亚相关大案，此次扩充标志着 CMS 正式布局泛欧专利诉讼市场。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临更专业的 SEP 诉讼对手，需警惕 UPC 成为新战场。建议提前评估专利组合风险，熟悉 UPC 程序规则，并考虑聘请具有跨法域经验的律所应对潜在纠纷。

news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC 诉讼专业化加剧，中企需提升跨境应诉能力", "SEP 纠纷风险上升，建议提前开展自由实施分析"]

news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国短视频及流媒体企业出海需警惕 SEP 许可风险。建议提前评估专利池许可成本，主动参与 FRAND 费率谈判，避免被动应诉导致高额赔偿或市场禁入，必要时寻求专业法律支持。

news_items.summary: There have been several new developments in the sprawling cellular SEP dispute
news_items.content: There have been several new developments in the sprawling cellular SEP dispute
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 蜂窝标准必要专利纠纷出现新进展：联发科已向统一专利法院（UPC）对华为提起诉讼。与此同时，英国法院正在审理第二起关于中止全球 FRAND 费率听证会的申请。这两起并行程序凸显了跨国 SEP 争端中管辖权协调的复杂性，标志着欧洲战场进一步升级。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临 UPC 与英国法院双重诉讼风险，需统筹应对策略。建议密切跟踪 UPC 判例走向，评估全球 FRAND 裁决冲突风险，提前布局跨法域抗辩方案，避免陷入被动局面。

news_items.ai_summary_zh: Optis Cellular Technology 在英国法院取得对苹果的重大胜利后不久，其在美国获得的三亿美元 FRAND 许可费裁决被联邦法院撤销。尽管美国判决被推翻，但这并不必然减少苹果最终需向专利权人支付的金额。该案凸显了全球 SEP 诉讼中不同法域裁判结果的复杂互动与不确定性，英国法院的强势立场可能成为后续赔偿计算的关键参考依据。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应警惕英美司法辖区在 SEP 纠纷中的联动效应。英国法院正成为全球费率设定高地，即便美国判决生变，仍可能面临基于英国判例的高额赔偿风险，需统筹全球诉讼策略。

news_items.title: IPBC Global 2025: Qualcomm IP boss on looking beyond smartphones for SEP growth
news_items.title_zh: IPBC 2025：高通 IP 主管谈超越手机的 SEP 增长
news_items.summary: Speaking in Boston this week, John Han explained the fundamental strategic and commercial shift taking place among major cellular patentees
news_items.content: Speaking in Boston this week, John Han explained the fundamental strategic and commercial shift taking place among major cellular patentees
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 在波士顿举行的 IPBC Global 2025 会议上，高通知识产权负责人 John Han 阐述了主要蜂窝专利持有者正在经历的根本性战略与商业转变。核心观点在于 SEP 许可重心正从智能手机领域向汽车、物联网等非手机终端扩展，以寻求新的收入增长点。这一趋势预示着欧洲及全球 SEP 许可谈判焦点的转移。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国车企及 IoT 厂商需警惕高通等巨头在非手机领域的许可施压。建议提前评估 SEP 风险，建立专项应对机制，并关注 FRAND 原则在新领域的适用边界，避免被动接受高额费率。

news_items.title_zh: LG 电子以双重身份加入 Via LA Qi 专利池
news_items.summary: The move is a significant step for the programme which already had 50% of Qi wireless charging SEPs covered
news_items.content: The move is a significant step for the programme which already had 50% of Qi wireless charging SEPs covered
news_items.ai_summary_zh: LG 电子正式加入 Via Licensing Alliance 管理的 Qi 无线充电标准必要专利池，并同时扮演许可人与被许可人的双重角色。此举显著增强了该专利池的覆盖率，使其已涵盖全球约 50% 的 Qi 无线充电标准必要专利，标志着欧洲及全球无线充电领域专利许可生态的重要整合。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国无线充电设备出口企业需关注此专利池扩容带来的许可成本变化。建议提前评估产品合规风险，主动接触专利池管理方获取许可方案，避免因未获授权而在欧洲市场面临侵权诉讼或海关扣押风险。

news_items.summary: Auto hubs driving calls for more work on SEP legislation
news_items.content: Auto hubs driving calls for more work on SEP legislation
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 在近期欧盟理事会会议上，以德国为首的汽车制造强国对拟议的欧盟标准必要专利（SEP）法规提出强烈反对。这些国家认为现有草案未充分考量汽车行业特殊性，呼吁进行更多评估与修订工作。此举标志着欧盟内部关于 SEP 监管框架的博弈进入关键阶段，立法进程可能因此延缓。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国车企及通信企业在欧需密切关注法规变动，利用成员国分歧争取有利条款。建议提前布局合规策略，参与公众咨询，避免未来许可成本激增或诉讼风险扩大。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["汽车制造国在欧盟理事会会议主导反对声音", "业界呼吁对 SEP 立法草案开展更多评估工作", "欧盟 SEP 监管框架立法进程面临实质性阻力"]

news_items.title_zh: UPC 受理第二起 Qi SEP 纠纷：Powermat 起诉 Anker

news_items.content: Given the increase in licensing and litigation activity concerning the standard it would not be surprising to see more European enforcement soon
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）近期受理了第二起涉及 Qi 无线充电标准的标准必要专利（SEP）纠纷，由 Powermat 科技对 Anker 提起。鉴于该技术标准相关的许可谈判与诉讼活动显著增加，预计未来欧洲地区的 SEP 执法行动将更加频繁，标志着 UPC 在 SEP 领域的管辖权实践正在加速扩展。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海企业需警惕 UPC 成为 SEP 维权新高地，尤其是无线充电等热门领域。建议提前排查产品侵权风险，评估 FRAND 许可合规性，并制定针对统一专利法院的应诉策略，避免遭遇禁令风险。

news_items.summary: Licensing head Leo Meng tells IAM readers that the Chinese implementer is “striving” to expand its own licensing revenue
news_items.content: Licensing head Leo Meng tells IAM readers that the Chinese implementer is “striving” to expand its own licensing revenue

news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临高额 SEP 成本时，应评估自身专利储备，探索通过加入专利池或双边许可实现收支平衡。建议加强高价值专利布局，从单纯付费方转向具备议价能力的许可参与者，降低合规风险。

news_items.title_zh: EPO 新研显示 UPC 正重塑标准必要专利策略
news_items.summary: The European Patent Office has today published extensive data shining a light on standard essential patents
news_items.content: The European Patent Office has today published extensive data shining a light on standard essential patents
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）发布关于标准必要专利（SEP）的详尽数据研究。该报告揭示了统一专利法院（UPC）的运作正在深刻改变权利人与实施者的 SEP 布局与许可策略。数据显示，UPC 的集中管辖机制提高了诉讼效率，促使各方重新评估 FRAND 许可谈判立场及全球专利组合的管理方式。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国企业应密切关注 EPO 数据导向，评估 UPC 诉讼风险。建议提前优化 SEP 许可谈判策略，利用数据支撑 FRAND 抗辩或主张，避免因策略滞后陷入被动诉讼或高额赔偿困境。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 发布详尽数据揭示 SEP 领域最新趋势与格局", "UPC 集中管辖机制显著重塑了 SEP 诉讼与许可策略", "权利人需依据新数据调整全球专利组合与 FRAND 立场"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用 EPO 数据优化 SEP 组合布局与 FRAND 谈判筹码", "警惕 UPC 集中裁决风险，制定针对性诉讼应对预案"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 涉及 EPO 发布 SEP 数据及 UPC 对策略影响，属欧洲核心 IP 动态。
news_items.title_en: UPC reshaping SEP strategies, new EPO study shows
core_points_zh: EPO 发布详尽数据揭示 SEP 领域最新趋势与格局
UPC 集中管辖机制显著重塑了 SEP 诉讼与许可策略
权利人需依据新数据调整全球专利组合与 FRAND 立场

news_items.title: Langbo pauses licensing efforts to focus on 6G R&D
news_items.title_zh: 朗博暂停许可努力以聚焦 6G 研发
news_items.summary: Although becoming a licensing giant like
news_items.content: Although becoming a licensing giant like "role model" InterDigital remains its top goal, Langbo will be a "pure lab" for the next three to five years, CEO says in exclusive interview
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 朗博公司 CEO 表示，尽管成为像 InterDigital 那样的许可巨头仍是长期目标，但未来三至五年公司将转型为“纯实验室”，暂停对外许可活动，全力投入 6G 技术研发。此举标志着该 SEP 持有者在新一代通信技术标准确立前的战略重心转移，旨在通过强化研发积累核心专利资产。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在 6G 预研阶段应关注此类头部 NPE 的动态，其暂停许可可能短期降低诉讼风险，但长期将增强其专利组合强度。建议加大 6G 基础研发，提前布局核心专利，以应对未来更强势的许可谈判。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["朗博明确未来三至五年暂停专利许可业务", "战略重心转向 6G 技术研发以构建纯实验室模式", "长期目标仍为成为类似 InterDigital 的许可巨头"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用窗口期加强 6G 核心技术自主研发与专利布局", "预判未来许可谈判难度增加，需提前储备应对筹码"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 涉及欧洲 SEP 许可策略调整及 6G 研发，关乎欧企 IP 布局。

战略重心转向 6G 技术研发以构建纯实验室模式

news_items.title: Revive the SEP regulation, say Germany, France and other EU countries
news_items.title_zh: 德法等国呼吁重启欧盟标准必要专利法规
news_items.summary: But only the European Commission has the power to “withdraw the withdrawal”
news_items.content: But only the European Commission has the power to “withdraw the withdrawal”
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 德国、法国及其他欧盟成员国公开呼吁重启此前被搁置的欧盟标准必要专利（SEP）监管提案。尽管多国施压，但文章指出唯有欧盟委员会拥有撤销“撤回决定”的法定权力。此举反映了成员国对建立统一 SEP 许可框架的迫切需求，旨在平衡权利人与实施者利益，减少跨国诉讼不确定性，推动欧洲单一市场内的技术标准化进程。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临 SEP 合规新变数，需密切关注欧盟立法重启进展。建议提前评估专利许可策略，加强 FRAND 原则应对能力，避免因法规突变引发诉讼风险或增加许可成本，同时积极参与公众咨询表达诉求。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["德法等多国联合呼吁重启欧盟 SEP 监管立法程序", "仅欧盟委员会有权撤销此前撤回该法规提案的决定", "成员国施压意在解决 SEP 许可透明度与 FRAND 争议"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注欧盟立法重启，预判许可规则变化趋势", "优化 FRAND 应对策略，防范潜在诉讼与成本风险"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 涉及欧盟 SEP 法规重启及德法等国立场，属核心政策动态。
news_items.title_en: Revive the SEP regulation, say Germany, France and other EU countries
core_points_zh: 德法等多国联合呼吁重启欧盟 SEP 监管立法程序
仅欧盟委员会有权撤销此前撤回该法规提案的决定
成员国施压意在解决 SEP 许可透明度与 FRAND 争议

news_items.title: Fortress-managed NPE to license nearly 2,000 5G assets into wireless industry
news_items.title_zh: Fortress 旗下 NPE 获近两千项 5G 资产授权许可
news_items.summary: Apogee Networks CIPO Bradley Ditty comments on the SEP portfolio acquisition from Shanghai Langbo: “the portfolio covers a variety of technologies crucial to 5G cellular devices and networks”.
news_items.content: Apogee Networks CIPO Bradley Ditty comments on the SEP portfolio acquisition from Shanghai Langbo: “the portfolio covers a variety of technologies crucial to 5G cellular devices and networks”.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 由 Fortress 管理的非执业实体 Apogee Networks 从上海朗波收购了涵盖近 2000 项 5G 资产的专利组合。该组合包含对 5G 蜂窝设备及网络至关重要的多项技术。此次交易旨在将该专利组合许可给无线行业，反映了全球 SEP 资产在欧洲及国际市场的流动与商业化趋势。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧出口或研发 5G 产品时，需排查是否涉及该新专利组合。建议提前评估许可风险，关注 FRAND 原则下的谈判策略，避免潜在诉讼干扰欧洲市场业务。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["Fortress 管理实体收购上海朗波近两千项 5G 专利资产", "专利组合覆盖 5G 设备及网络关键技术，拟进行行业许可", "体现非执业实体在欧洲及全球无线市场的专利布局策略"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["排查出口产品是否落入该 5G 专利组合保护范围", "预判 NPE 许可策略，准备 FRAND 合规应对方案"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 涉及欧洲市场 5G 标准必要专利许可动态，影响在欧运营企业。
news_items.title_en: Fortress-managed NPE to license nearly 2,000 5G assets into wireless industry

news_items.title: EU files WTO appeal after partial loss in SEP case against China
news_items.title_zh: 欧盟在 SEP 案部分败诉后向 WTO 提起上诉
news_items.summary: Panel found no fault with Chinese anti-suit injunctions, but condemned lack of transparency
news_items.content: Panel found no fault with Chinese anti-suit injunctions, but condemned lack of transparency
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟针对一起涉及中国的标准必要专利（SEP）争端，在世界贸易组织（WTO）专家组作出部分不利裁决后正式提起上诉。专家组裁定中国颁发的反诉讼禁令本身未违规，但严厉批评了相关程序缺乏透明度。此事件标志着欧中在 SEP 执法标准与司法管辖权上的冲突升级，欧盟试图通过多边机制挑战中国的司法实践。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧运营需高度关注透明度合规，避免授人以柄。面对欧盟利用多边机制施压，企业应完善全球诉讼应对策略，平衡国内外司法行动，防范因程序瑕疵引发的国际贸易制裁风险。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟因 SEP 案部分败诉，正式向 WTO 争端解决机构提起上诉", "WTO 专家组认定中国反诉讼禁令合规，但指摘其缺乏透明度", "此举反映欧盟意图通过国际规则制约中国 SEP 司法管辖权"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["强化涉外诉讼程序透明度，规避被诉违反国际规则风险", "统筹全球 SEP 布局与诉讼策略，积极应对多边机制挑战"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 欧盟就 SEP 案向 WTO 提起上诉，直接涉及中欧知识产权规则博弈。
news_items.title_en: EU files WTO appeal after partial loss in SEP case against China
core_points_zh: 欧盟因 SEP 案部分败诉，正式向 WTO 争端解决机构提起上诉
WTO 专家组认定中国反诉讼禁令合规，但指摘其缺乏透明度
此举反映欧盟意图通过国际规则制约中国 SEP 司法管辖权

news_items.title: Nokia’s SEP litigation playbook against tech giants
news_items.title_zh: 诺基亚针对科技巨头的标准必要专利诉讼策略解析
news_items.summary: Campaigns against Acer, Asus and Hisense follow the same formula that has achieved a 100% settlement rate in previous disputes
news_items.content: Campaigns against Acer, Asus and Hisense follow the same formula that has achieved a 100% settlement rate in previous disputes
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 本文分析诺基亚对宏碁、华硕及海信发起的标准必要专利（SEP）诉讼活动。报道指出，诺基亚沿用了一套经过验证的诉讼公式，该策略在此前纠纷中实现了百分之百的和解率。文章旨在揭示诺基亚如何通过统一的法律施压手段，迫使大型科技公司接受其许可条款，反映了当前欧洲 SEP 执法的高强度趋势。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国科技企业需警惕诺基亚等权利人在欧洲的标准化诉讼攻势。建议企业提前评估 SEP 风险，建立应对 FRAND 原则的谈判预案，避免陷入被动和解局面，同时关注德国等关键法域的司法动向。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["诺基亚对多家科技巨头采用统一且高度标准化的诉讼公式", "该诉讼策略在过往争议中保持了百分之百的案件和解记录", "宏观层面展示了权利人在欧洲利用诉讼驱动许可谈判的模式"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕权利人利用高胜诉预期的诉讼公式施压促成快速和解", "出口企业应提前布局欧洲 SEP 合规与反制谈判的双重预案"]

news_items.title: Wilus and Lenovo agree Wi-Fi 6 deal aided by Sisvel
news_items.title_zh: Wilus 与联想在 Sisvel 协助下达成 Wi-Fi 6 许可协议
news_items.summary: Despite the highly contentious nature of licensing in the space the agreement was struck without litigation
news_items.content: Despite the highly contentious nature of licensing in the space the agreement was struck without litigation
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 尽管无线通信领域标准必要专利（SEP）许可通常争议激烈且易引发诉讼，但 Wilus 与联想近期在专利池管理机构 Sisvel 的协助下，成功就 Wi-Fi 6 技术达成了许可协议。该交易的关键在于双方未通过 litigation 即解决了潜在纠纷，体现了在复杂技术领域中通过商业谈判解决 FRAND 许可问题的可能性，为欧洲 SEP 生态系统提供了非诉解决的积极案例。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临 SEP 许可压力时，应重视通过专业机构促成非诉和解。主动参与 FRAND 谈判可降低诉讼成本与禁令风险，建议建立专项应对机制，利用专利池渠道高效解决许可争端，保障产品在欧市场准入。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["Wilus 与联想在未发生诉讼的情况下达成 Wi-Fi 6 许可协议", "Sisvel 作为中间方协助促成了这一具有争议领域的商业和解", "该案例展示了欧洲 SEP 许可中非诉解决机制的可行性与价值"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["借助专利池管理机构可高效化解 SEP 许可僵局", "非诉和解是规避欧洲禁令风险与高昂诉讼成本的关键"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 涉及欧洲 SEP 许可动态，虽无诉讼但反映欧盟市场 FRAND 谈判趋势。
news_items.title_en: Wilus and Lenovo agree Wi-Fi 6 deal aided by Sisvel

news_items.title: Huawei takes MediaTek fight to the UPC as pan-EU court becomes SEP battle go-to
news_items.title_zh: 华为将联发科诉讼提交 UPC，泛欧法院成 SEP 争端首选
news_items.summary: Unified Patent Court now playing a major role in SEP licensing disputes
news_items.content: Unified Patent Court now playing a major role in SEP licensing disputes
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）正成为标准必要专利（SEP）许可纠纷的关键战场。华为已率先针对联发科在 UPC 提起诉讼，标志着该泛欧司法机构在处理跨国专利争议中扮演核心角色。此动态显示企业倾向于利用 UPC 的泛欧效力解决复杂 SEP 许可僵局，重塑欧洲专利诉讼格局。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临 SEP 诉讼常态化，需重视 UPC 泛欧禁令风险。建议提前评估专利组合稳定性，制定涵盖全欧的许可谈判策略，避免单一败诉导致多国市场受阻，并密切关注 UPC 判例走向。
news_items.ai_core_points_zh: ["华为正式向统一专利法院提起针对联发科的 SEP 诉讼", "UPC 已确立为泛欧标准必要专利许可争端的首选解决地", "跨国科技巨头加速利用 UPC 机制解决全球性专利授权分歧"]
news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕 UPC 泛欧禁令对出口业务的系统性冲击风险", "需构建适配泛欧司法环境的 SEP 许可与应诉防御体系"]
news_items.ai_relevance_reason_zh: 涉及 UPC 受理华为与联发科 SEP 纠纷，体现泛欧法院核心地位。
news_items.title_en: Huawei takes MediaTek fight to the UPC as pan-EU court becomes SEP battle go-to

news_items.title: Ericsson joins Avanci Video programme for video streamers
news_items.title_zh: 爱立信加入 Avanci 视频计划以支持流媒体许可
news_items.summary: “By joining Avanci Video, we aim to support the industry's need for a comprehensive approach to licensing essential video technologies,” states Ericsson CIPO Christina Petersson
news_items.content: “By joining Avanci Video, we aim to support the industry's need for a comprehensive approach to licensing essential video technologies,” states Ericsson CIPO Christina Petersson
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 瑞典电信巨头爱立信正式宣布加入 Avanci Video 许可计划，旨在为视频流媒体行业提供全面的必要视频技术许可方案。该公司首席知识产权官克里斯蒂娜·彼得松表示，此举是为了满足行业对统一许可途径的迫切需求。该动态反映了欧洲 SEP 持有人正通过专利池模式，将许可范围从通信终端向内容分发领域延伸，可能重塑视频编码技术的许可格局。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国视频流媒体及设备出口企业需警惕许可成本上升风险。建议提前评估 Avanci 专利池覆盖范围，审慎分析许可条款合规性，并关注 FRAND 原则在欧洲的最新司法适用动态，做好应对潜在许可谈判或诉讼的准备。

news_items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中企需警惕英国司法倾向，评估临时许可风险。建议加强全球许可策略布局，避免单一法域裁决冲击，同时关注后续上诉动态以调整合规与诉讼应对方案。

news_items.ai_summary_zh: 爱立信就临时许可费率声明向英国最高法院提起上诉，这是自 2020 年里程碑判决以来最重要的 FRAND 上诉案。该案核心争议在于法院是否应在最终审判前干预许可条款，其结果将重新界定英国法院在标准必要专利全球费率裁决中的角色与权力边界。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临 SEP 诉讼时，需高度关注英国法院对临时禁令及费率裁定的新动向。建议提前布局抗辩策略，评估英国作为全球费率裁决地的风险，并考虑多元化诉讼地以规避单一法域的不利裁定。

news_items.title: Recognising the two faces in the world of SEPs and FRAND
news_items.title_zh: 识别 SEP 与 FRAND 世界的两面性
news_items.summary: IAM is a unique and timely intelligence service that treats IP as a business asset and tool rather than simply as a legal right, informing boardrooms worldwide.
news_items.content: IAM is a unique and timely intelligence service that treats IP as a business asset and tool rather than simply as a legal right, informing boardrooms worldwide.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 本文深入剖析标准必要专利（SEP）领域中许可谈判的双重面貌：一方面强调技术共享与标准化合作，另一方面揭示诉讼博弈与费率争议。文章指出在欧盟新监管框架及统一专利法院（UPC）背景下，FRAND 原则的执行正面临更复杂的商业与法律挑战，需平衡创新激励与市场公平。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局 SEP 时，须警惕“双面”风险，既要利用标准化红利，又要防范高额诉讼。建议提前构建符合欧盟标准的 FRAND 合规体系，并在 UPC 管辖下优化证据保全与应诉策略，避免被动。

news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["建立符合欧盟标准的 FRAND 合规体系以规避反垄断风险", "针对 UPC 诉讼特点优化证据管理与跨境应诉防御策略"]

news_items.title: Debunking four of the biggest myths in SEP licensing
news_items.title_zh: 破除标准必要专利许可四大迷思
news_items.summary: IAM is a unique and timely intelligence service that treats IP as a business asset and tool rather than simply as a legal right, informing boardrooms worldwide.
news_items.content: IAM is a unique and timely intelligence service that treats IP as a business asset and tool rather than simply as a legal right, informing boardrooms worldwide.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 本文针对当前标准必要专利（SEP）许可市场中广泛存在的四个主要误解进行深入剖析。文章强调应将知识产权视为商业资产而非单纯法律权利，旨在为企业董事会提供决策参考。通过澄清 FRAND 原则适用、许可谈判策略及诉讼风险等关键误区，帮助利益相关方建立更理性的许可生态认知，优化在欧洲市场的 IP 运营策略。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临复杂 SEP 环境，需摒弃被动应诉思维。建议深入理解欧洲许可市场逻辑，将专利作为商业筹码主动布局。同时应警惕片面信息误导，建立基于数据的内部评估体系，以从容应对潜在诉讼或谈判压力。

news_items.title: IAM’s ‘Leading Lights’ report features female CIPOs top advice on licensing, negotiation, leadership
news_items.title_zh: IAM 报告聚焦女性高管：SEP 许可谈判与领导力建议
news_items.summary: IAM's special report for 2025 Q1 features global expertise by licensing executives at Ericsson, Qualcomm, InterDigital, Xiaomi, Via Licensing Alliance and Avanci
news_items.content:
It is critical to tell the stories of female chief intellectual property officers (CIPOs) to improve diversity in the licensing profession. IAM's 2025 Q1 special report “ Leading Lights ” features contributions from female CIPOs and top licensing executives from companies such as Ericsson , Qualcomm, InterDigital , Xiaomi, Via Licensing Alliance and Avanci.

The report covers patent licensing topics, IP strategy, team leadership, negotiation tactics and standard essential patent licensing. It offers new perspectives on IP monetisation, emphasising the importance of a more human approach based on mutual respect and clear communication. The report also delves into the SEP licensing world, providing insights and tips for licensing patents globally.

The stories of successful women in the patent industry, such as former US Patent and Trademark Director Kathi Vidal , HP Chief IP Counsel Ceyda Maisami , and Qualcomm General Counsel Anne Chaplin , serve as role models for aspiring IP professionals. Overall, the report aims to benefit all IP professionals by showcasing the wisdom and expertise of female leaders in the field.

Via LA Chief Licensing Officer Jane Bu writes that traditional patent licensing negotiations often lead to tension and a lack of progress. She urges a more human approach to these negotiations. One practical tip is to shift from a negotiation mindset to a collaborative partnership, focusing on aligning expectations and finding a solution that meets everyone's needs. Another tip is to view disagreement as a business decision, centred on closing the "numbers gap" between the licensor's proposed rate and the licensee's budget. Ultimately, a human approach to patent licensing negotiations involves respect, clear communication, and a focus on long-term collaboration.

Na Wei, Xiaomi’s general manager of corporate business development and intellectual property strategy, changed careers from being a wireless technology inventor to an IP licensing executive . Her technical background in inventing and experience as a 3GPP delegate provide valuable perspectives in licensing negotiations. Inventors understand the difficulty of coming up with inventions and the value they bring to technology, she writes. Wei emphasises the importance of conducting technical evaluations on the quality of patents and advocates for a fair allocation of royalties among true innovations. She also shares her considerations for efficient licensing negotiations, such as basing discussions on objective matters, finding common ground and staying focused on key issues.

Avanci, a standard essential patent (SEP) joint licensing platform, held a virtual roundtable discussion with female IP professionals from different regions to discuss the state of their markets in 2024 and predictions for the future. They discussed the increased focus on patent monetisation in markets like Korea, ideas for new joint SEP licensing programmes, the extension of IoT offerings to more product verticals, the potential for increased licensing in new territories such as Brazil and India and the expansion of licensing in the video streaming market. The participants expressed that successful movement to new markets requires education, tailored communication strategies and understanding the business and operational needs of new industries. They highlight the importance of building relationships and respecting cultural differences to succeed.

Bookmark the Special Report 2025: Q1 Leading Lights hub today and download the PDF version of the report.

news_items.title: UPC unlikely to issue UK-style global FRAND determinations, says Munich Judge Zigann
news_items.title_zh: 慕尼黑法官称 UPC 不太可能作出英式全球 FRAND 裁决
news_items.summary: Discussions about the pan-European court took centre stage this morning as IPBC Europe 2025 kicked off
news_items.content: Discussions about the pan-European court took centre stage this morning as IPBC Europe 2025 kicked off
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 在 IPBC Europe 2025 会议期间，来自慕尼黑的地方分庭法官 Zigann 指出，统一专利法院（UPC）不太可能像英国法院那样发布具有全球约束力的 FRAND 费率裁决。该言论明确了 UPC 在标准必要专利纠纷中的管辖边界，暗示其将更聚焦于欧洲区域内的专利有效性及侵权判定，而非设定全球许可条件，这对跨国企业的诉讼地选择产生重要影响。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应对 SEP 纠纷时，需调整单一诉讼解决全球费率的预期。建议在德国或 UPC 提起侵权诉讼的同时，评估是否需在英国另行发起费率裁决之诉，以构建组合策略，避免因管辖权限制导致全球许可谈判陷入僵局。

news_items.title: Munich Higher Regional Court confirms new FRAND guidelines in VoiceAge vs HMD
news_items.title_zh: 慕尼黑高院确认 VoiceAge 诉 HMD 案 FRAND 新指南
news_items.summary: Higher Regional Court rules HMD is unwilling licensee infringing VoiceAge EVS speech-coding patent and cannot sell products in Germany.
news_items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles df-mp Patentanwälte Rechtsanwälte PartG mbB DHS HEUKING View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Daniel F. Seitz Dr. Tobias Hahn Denis Monégier du Sorbier View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

df-mp Patentanwälte Rechtsanwälte PartG mbB

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

HMD continues to infringe a patent belonging to VoiceAge's speech-coding standard EVS and cannot distribute corresponding products in Germany. The Higher Regional Court Munich has classified HMD as an unwilling licensee in its ruling. The judges simultaneously confirmed an injunction against Oppo.

The Higher Regional Court Munich under presiding judge Lars Meinhardt has rejected HMD’s appeal against a ruling by the Regional Court Munich. The court found that HMD infringes the EVS speech-coding patent EP 2 102 619 owned by VoiceAge and is not a willing licensee (case ID: 6 U 3824/22 Kart).

Originally, the court had planned to publish its highly anticipated ruling on 6 February. However, due to the scope of the decision, the court needed six additional weeks.

Given the fundamental importance of today’s decision, the Higher Regional Court Munich has granted HMD leave to appeal to the German Federal Court of Justice. The dispute between VoiceAge and HMD has gained considerable significance for SEP and FRAND law in Germany.

In 2019, VoiceAge sued HMD over five patents in Mannheim and Munich. EP 1 509 903 , EP 2 162 880 , EP 2 707 687, EP 3 132 443 and EP 2 102 619 cover the speech-coding standard EVS.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 德国慕尼黑高等法院驳回 HMD 上诉，裁定其侵犯 VoiceAge 的 EVS 语音编码专利且属非自愿被许可人，维持禁售令。法院同时确认针对 Oppo 的禁令，并批准 HMD 向联邦最高法院上诉。此案确立了德国 SEP 与 FRAND 许可谈判的新司法标准，具有里程碑意义。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国手机及通信企业需重新评估在德 FRAND 谈判策略，避免因被认定为“非自愿”而遭禁售。建议提前准备符合德国最新司法标准的许可要约，并关注联邦最高法院最终裁决风向。

news_items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕被德法院认定为非自愿被许可人的高风险", "依据新指南优化许可谈判流程以规避禁售风险"]

news_items.title: FRAND licence disputes did not lead to more cases at UK patent courts
news_items.title_zh: FRAND 许可纠纷未致英国专利法院案件激增
news_items.summary: UK figures show London's reputation for FRAND has not led to the anticipated surge in case numbers at UK patent courts.
news_items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles Taylor Wessing KATHER AUGENSTEIN Grünecker View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Harm van der Heijden Grégoire Desrousseaux Dr. Markus Engelhard View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

The number of cases at the UK High Court fell slightly in 2024, while the IPEC saw a modest increase in IP cases compared to the previous year. However, London's reputation for FRAND-rate determinations has not yet delivered the surge in case numbers that many UK lawyers had anticipated.

The UK High Court and Court of Appeal have established themselves globally as the go-to courts for determining FRAND rates between SEP holders and implementers. Many UK lawyers had hoped this would attract more cases and business to London firms. However, according to the UK civil justice statistics , this did not materialise in 2024.

The UK High Court recorded slightly fewer cases than in 2023, dropping from 46 to 44 new patent cases. The court reached its peak in 2016 and 2017, with 71 and 85 new cases respectively. Numbers then fell to 40 and have since hovered around 50 new cases per year. After falling to 35 in 2022, cases recovered by 31% to 46 in 2023.

Many UK lawyers saw this as evidence that the UK’s position outside the UPC was benefiting its patent courts. They had hoped this trend would continue. However, these hopes were dashed, particularly in the final two quarters of 2024 when new cases notably declined. The High Court, with permanent judges Richard Meade and James Mellor, recorded only nine new cases in each of these quarters, compared to ten and 16 in the first two quarters.

Like the High Court, the Intellectual Property Enterprise Court saw its highest number of cases in 2017, with 242 new IP cases. The IPEC, a specialist subdivision within the Business and Property Courts of the UK High Court, has since consistently recorded fewer than 200 cases annually.

Over the past twelve months, new IP cases totalled 141, up 6.9% from 132 in 2023. This marks the second consecutive year of growth. While the UK statistics do not specify how many IPEC cases relate to patents, experts believe technical property rights make up the majority.
news_items.ai_summary_zh: 尽管伦敦确立了全球 FRAND 费率裁决中心地位，但 2024 年英国高等法院新专利案量微降至 44 件，未现预期增长。虽知识产权企业法院（IPEC）案件小幅回升，但受统一专利法院（UPC）分流及季度波动影响，英国脱离 UPC 后的案件红利在 2024 年末显著消退，显示市场格局趋于稳定。
news_items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应理性看待英国法院在 SEP 领域的角色，避免盲目扎堆诉讼。需结合 UPC 进展评估管辖策略，利用 IPEC 处理中小额争议，同时在英欧两地布局以应对潜在的平行诉讼风险。
